name: Amulet of Bones
description: When you would be reduced to 0 hit points, you instead drop to 1 hit point. The amulet then crumbles to dust.
originalText: Negate any single source of damage that would kill your character and destroy this card.

name: Ancient Book of Cleansing
description: This reference contains strange lore. Once per long rest, spend 10 minutes consulting it to gain advantage on one Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion check related to a creature, curse, dungeon, or magical effect. On a natural 20, the DM may reveal one additional useful detail.
originalText: coming soon

name: Bag of Holding
description: This item functions as a standard Bag of Holding. It can store up to 500 lb. of gear, not exceeding 64 cubic feet. If overloaded, pierced, or torn, it follows the normal Bag of Holding rules.
originalText: The inside of this bag is as deep as you need it to be. You may now hold as many treasure and item cards as you like.

name: Behemoth Arm
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. You may now use your arm as a weapon which would deal 1d8 damage. You may also use this weapon as your move during your turn. The arm can bend around corners and enemies and will never miss its creature. The arm can extend and retract to pull enemies in.
originalText: You may now use your arm as a weapon which would deal 5 damage. You may also use this weapon as your move during your turn. The arm can bend around corners and enemies and will never miss its target. The arm can extend and retract to pull enemies in.

name: Believer Stone
description: At dawn, roll once on the Treasure table. Until the next dawn, the stone gains the properties of the rolled treasure. The Believer Stone itself cannot be selected.
originalText: At the start of combat, this stone transforms into another treasure card which will revert back into the Believer Stone at the end of combat.

name: Bewitching Mirror
description: As an action, present the mirror to a creature within 30 feet. The creature must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it is trapped inside the mirror and incapacitated. The mirror has AC 12 and 20 hit points. Destroying the mirror releases the creature. The mirror can hold only one creature at a time.
originalText: Reveal this mirror to a target to attempt to trap it within the mirror. If this mirror is later broken, the target will be released and the mirror destroyed.

name: Bladeturn
description: You are immune to a single source of damage of your choosing once per combat. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: You are immune to a single source of damage of your choosing once per combat.

name: Blood Aura Plate
description: Increases your hit points by 5. At the end of your turn, you can steal 1 hit points from all adjacent creatures. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Increases your stamina by 5. At the end of your turn, you can steal 1 stamina from all adjacent targets.

name: Blood Drinker
description: Deals 1d6 damage and restores 1 hit points every time you deal damage with this weapon. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Deals 3 damage and restores 1 stamina every time you deal damage with this weapon.

name: Blood Gift Emblem
description: Using this emblem you may trade 5 maximum hit points for 1 random treasure card from a selection of 3. You may use this ability as much and as often as you want until your base hit points is 1. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Using this emblem you may trade 5 maximum stamina for 1 random treasure card from a selection of 3. You may use this ability as much and as often as you want until your base stamina is 1.

name: Blunt Saxophone
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d6 damage. Whenever you are about to deal damage with this weapon, play a quick tune that doubles all physical damage dealt by you and your allies until the start of your next turn.
originalText: Deals 4 damage. Whenever you are about to deal damage with this weapon, play a quick tune that doubles all physical damage dealt by you and your allies until the start of your next turn.

name: Book of Cursed Spells
description: When using this book, a random spell is selected. You must pay the charge cost and must complete casting the spell or this book will be destroyed. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: When using this book, a random spell is selected. You must pay the Stamina cost and must complete casting the spell or this book will be destroyed.

name: Book of Faces
description: Looking into this book allows you to change your face to resemble any face you have seen in the last 30 hours. If you do not change back to your original face before time runs out, you will lose your face forever. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Looking into this book allows you to change your face to resemble any face you have seen in the last 30 hours. If you do not change back to your original face before time runs out, you will lose your face forever.

name: Bottled Wormhole
description: Toss a bottle that when broken casts a Wormhole spell which deals 1d6 damage to all creatures in an area and pulls them all into the center of the spell. Allies may roll to grab onto something and avoid the damage and pull. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Toss a bottle that when broken casts a Wormhole spell which deals 3 damage to all targets in an area and pulls them all into the center of the spell. Allies may roll to grab onto something and avoid the damage and pull.

name: Branded Pain of Fortune
description: All 1's become 20's at the cost of reducing your maximum hit points by 10 every time you roll a natural 1. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.
originalText: All 1's become 20's at the cost of reducing your maximum stamina by 10 every time you roll a Critical Fail.

name: Breadbeard's Hat
description: Increases your hit points by 10 and summons a Skeleton Pirate to fight alongside you at the start of each of your turns. You may wear this on top of your other armor. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Increases your stamina by 10 and summons a Skeleton Pirate to fight alongside you at the start of each of your turns. You may wear this on top of your other armor.

name: Chipped Prism
description: A single creatureed spell may be cast through the Attuned Prism to hit two creatures at half potency. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: A single targeted spell may be cast through the Attuned Prism to hit two targets at half potency.

name: Coin of Providence
description: Once per long rest before making an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, flip a coin. Heads: treat the roll as a natural 20. Tails: treat the roll as a natural 1. This result cannot be rerolled.
originalText: Instead of rolling the dice, you may flip this coin once per battle. Heads, you Critical. Tails, you Critical Fail.

name: Convoluted Composite Crossbow
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d10 damage. This thing is very hard and complicated to load and can generally only be reloaded out of combat.
originalText: Deals 8 Damage. This thing is very hard and complicated to load and can generally only be reloaded out of combat.

name: Crystal Catalyst
description: Summon forth 10 Gemling to aid you in battle. Gemlings can attack for 1d4 damage in melee range. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Summon forth 10 Gemling to aid you in battle. Gemlings can attack for 1 damage in melee range.

name: Deconstruction Bomber
description: As an action, throw or place this device at a point within 30 feet. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 force or fire damage on a failure, or half as much on a success. The item is consumed after use.
originalText: coming soon

name: Deeper Freezer
description: Release a frosty beam of ice that deals 1d6 damage and freezes a creature in place, stunning them for a turn. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Release a frosty beam of ice that deals 3 damage and freezes a target in place, stunning them for a turn.

name: Dragonskin Bow
description: Deals 1d6 damage and triple damage on natural 20s. This bonus applies only to weapon attacks made with the item and cannot stack with another doubling or tripling effect.
originalText: Deals 4 damage and triple damage on Criticals.

name: Dulled Vopral Slayer
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Deals 1d4 damage. natural 20 rolls cause this blade to instantly kill the creature. If the creature is too important to instantly die... then I guess it can do 4d6 damage. A Vopral blade is much different than a Vorpral blade, that is not a typo.
originalText: Deals 2 damage. Critical rolls cause this blade to instantly kill the target. If the target is too important to instantly die... then I guess it can do 15 damage. A Vopral blade is much different than a Vorpral blade, that is not a typo.

name: Dungeoneer Encyclopedia
description: This reference contains strange lore. Once per long rest, spend 10 minutes consulting it to gain advantage on one Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion check related to a creature, curse, dungeon, or magical effect. On a natural 20, the DM may reveal one additional useful detail.
originalText: coming soon

name: Duplication Orb
description: Once per month, duplicate one nonmagical item worth 500 GP or less. The duplicate is permanent. Magical items, artifacts, living creatures, and currency cannot be duplicated.
originalText: Duplicates one of your items in your bag. The item you duplicated, as well as the original, are now bound to to you. They cannot be given to other party members or destroyed in any way. Should you die, these items will turn to dust.

name: Dwarven Runeblade
description: Deals 1d8 damage. Deals double damage if wielded by a Dwarf. Anytime you defeat a creature with this weapon, you may attack again with it as a bonus action. This bonus applies only to weapon attacks made with the item and cannot stack with another doubling or tripling effect.
originalText: Deals 5 damage. Deals double damage if wielded by a Dwarf. Anytime you defeat a target with this weapon, you may attack again with it as a bonus action.

name: Elaphelk Horn Blade
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d6 damage and allows you to use one of your class abilities with no charge cost as a bonus action.
originalText: Deals 4 damage and allows you to use one of your class abilities with no stamina cost as a bonus action.

name: Elaphelk Horn Horn
description: Grants everyone on your team a free action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Grants everyone on your team a free action.

name: Elaphelk Horn Staff
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d4 damage. Your spells always cost hit points, but anytime you cast them you may cast an additional spell as a bonus action.
originalText: Deals 2 damage. Your spells always cost stamina, but anytime you cast them you may cast an additional spell as a bonus action.

name: Electronet Pistol
description: This experimental ranged weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges at dawn. As an action, expend 1 charge to make a ranged spell attack with a range of 60 feet. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 force damage and must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet.
originalText: coming soon

name: Elven Sugar Cookies
description: Allows you to use each of your abilities at the cost of a single action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Allows you to use each of your abilities at the cost of a single action.

name: Emerald of Persistence
description: The holder of this Emerald may attack again anytime they miss with a basic attack, however they may not attack with an attack that misses from the use of this or any Emerald. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: The holder of this Emerald may attack again anytime they miss with a basic attack, however they may not attack with an attack that misses from the use of this or any Emerald.

name: Energy Cannon??
description: This experimental ranged weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges at dawn. As an action, expend 1 charge to make a ranged spell attack with a range of 60 feet. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 force damage and must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet.
originalText: coming soon

name: Everfull Goblet
description: The first Common or Uncommon potion poured into this goblet permanently attunes the goblet to that potion. As a bonus action once on each of your turns, you may drink from the goblet and gain the effects of the stored potion. Once the goblet stores a potion, it can never store a different potion. Rare, Epic, and Legendary potions cannot be stored in the goblet.
originalText: A potion may be used to fill the goblet to create an endless supply of said potion. The goblet refills at the end of every combat.

name: Eyes of N'locnil
description: All Abilities and Items have their charge costs removed, but your character has their eyes replaced with those of a demon. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: All Abilities and Items have their stamina costs removed, but your character has their eyes replaced with those of a demon.

name: Fine Lasren Belt
description: Increases your hit points by 5. Anytime you use hit points on abilities, you may give that hit points to an ally in range. You may wear this on top of your other armor. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Increases your stamina by 5. Anytime you use stamina on abilities, you may give that stamina to an ally in range. You may wear this on top of your other armor.

name: Firework Launcher
description: Launch four fireworks that fly up and slam down dealing 1d4 damage in a small area. Each firework may be creatureed at a different point of landing. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Launch four fireworks that fly up and slam down dealing 2 damage in a small area. Each firework may be targeted at a different point of landing.

name: Fist in a Box
description: This treasure has been reworked for D&D: once per long rest, the bearer may use it as an action to gain advantage on one ability check, saving throw, or attack roll that fits the item name and scene. The DM determines the exact narrative effect.
originalText: Coming soon

name: Frog on a Stick
description: Place a frog on a stick into the ground. All allies regenerate 1 hit points at the end of your turn. Frog on a stick can be destroyed if attacked. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Place a frog on a stick into the ground. All allies regenerate 1 stamina at the end of your turn. Frog on a stick can be destroyed if attacked.

name: Ginyu's Shard of Perversion
description: You and creature of same general size switch bodies. You retain your class, but your inventories are swapped. The shard then breaks forever. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: You and target of same general size switch bodies. You retain your class, but your inventories are swapped. The shard then breaks forever.

name: Grace's Light
description: Ray of Frost now pierces in a line instead of as a single projectile. This spell now deals 1d8 damage, has 10 range, but no longer stuns. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Ray of Frost now pierces in a line instead of as a single projectile. This spell now deals 5 damage, has 10 range, but no longer stuns.

name: Grimshade Blade
description: Deals 1d8 damage, rolling a 1 spawns a very strong Skeleton who exists only to kill you. This is the Shade of the Grimshade Blade. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Deals 6 damage, rolling a 1 spawns a very strong Skeleton who exists only to kill you. This is the Shade of the Grimshade Blade.

name: Guise of Bellows
description: Increases your hit points by 5 and allows you to breathe freely regardless of your environment. You may wear this on top of your other armor. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Increases your stamina by 5 and allows you to breathe freely regardless of your environment. You may wear this on top of your other armor.

name: Hammer of Light
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d8 damage. natural 20s cause this weapon to cast Blessing of Strength on yourself.
originalText: Deals 5 damage. Criticals cause this weapon to cast Blessing of Strength on yourself.

name: Headcannon Helmet
description: Shoot a firebomb at a creature dealing 1d6 damage. Until the start of your next turn, every time an ally misses an attack you may shoot another firebomb at any creature in range. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Shoot a firebomb at a target dealing 4 damage. Until the start of your next turn, every time an ally misses an attack you may shoot another firebomb at any target in range.

name: Headhunter Axe
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d8 damage. This weapon often leads to decapitations when used.
originalText: Deals 6 damage. This weapon often leads to decapitations when used.

name: Heartbark Crossbow
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Deals 1d8 damage and knocks creatures back up to 3 5-foot squares.
originalText: Deals 5 damage and knocks targets back up to 3 spaces.

name: Heartwall Locket
description: Anytime you or an ally rolls a natural 20, you may restore 3 hit points to a player of your choosing. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Anytime you or an ally rolls a Critical, you may restore 3 stamina to a player of your choosing.

name: Holy Canteen
description: Restores all of your hit points if full. Can be refilled with almost any drinkable source. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Restores all of your stamina if full. Can be refilled with almost any drinkable source.

name: Hourglass of the Sandbold
description: Smash this hourglass on the ground. No character can use anytime abilities until the end of combat unless their race is Kobold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Smash this hourglass on the ground. No character can use anytime abilities until the end of combat unless their race is Kobold.

name: Hurricane Bracer
description: Summon forth a hurricane in a massive area that deals 1d8 damage to everyone caught in it and allows you to move all creatures caught inside it to any open 5-foot square in the area. Characters can not be knocked out or killed from the effects of this hurricane. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Summon forth a hurricane in a massive area that deals 5 damage to everyone caught in it and allows you to move all targets caught inside it to any open space in the area. Characters can not be knocked out or killed from the effects of this hurricane.

description: This treasure has been reworked for D&D: once per long rest, the bearer may use it as an action to gain advantage on one ability check, saving throw, or attack roll that fits the item name and scene. The DM determines the exact narrative effect.

description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. You and all clothing, weapons, armor, and treasure cards on you become invisible for a short time or until end of combat. You can attack and use abilities while invisible.
originalText: You and all clothing, weapons, armor, and treasure cards on you become invisible for a short time or until end of combat. You can attack and use abilities while invisible.

name: Jar of Leeches

originalText: A jar filled with 5 leeches. The leeches attack the nearest target and reduce their maximum health by 1 permanently everytime they deal damage.

description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Allows the casting of the Wizard spell Fireball at no cost. These fireballs however miss about half the time.
originalText: Allows the casting of the Wizard spell Fireball at no cost. These fireballs however miss about half the time.

name: Kingfisher Cloth

originalText: Increases your stamina by 5. Pick one of your Class Spells, this Spell no longer costs stamina when cast. You may wear other armor with these Robes.

description: This treasure has been reworked for D&D: once per long rest, the bearer may use it as an action to gain advantage on one ability check, saving throw, or attack roll that fits the item name and scene. The DM determines the exact narrative effect.

originalText: Deals 5 damage. Pick one of your Class Spells, this Spell no longer costs stamina while casting through this staff. The wielder of this staff leads the hearts and minds of those that lead the wielder of this staff.

originalText: Deals 4 damage and creates an arc of lightning that bounces off the target hit to nearby enemies within 3 range for 2 damage. Can bounce up to 3 times.

originalText: Deals 4 damage to two adjacent targets. This blade is made of a white gold, however gold is a terrible metal, and this blade will break on a Critical Failure.

originalText: Deals 2 damage. You pick up to three targets to hit with this boomerang as long as the arc would make some logical sense.

description: This treasure has been reworked for D&D: once per long rest, the bearer may use it as an action to gain advantage on one ability check, saving throw, or attack roll that fits the item name and scene. The DM determines the exact narrative effect.

originalText: Deals 5 damage. Criticals cause this weapon to slice a limb off if possible.

originalText: Fire up to 5 arcane missiles that deal 2 damage each. These missiles can be split at any number of enemies, but multiple missiles hitting the same target will have their damage reduced by 1.

originalText: You may control one of your allies this turn as long as you have line of sight. You may have them use an attack or ability and they will be forced to pay the stamina costs you use. An ally may attempt to resist if they wish.

originalText: Deals 9 damage. Attacking with this knife causes it to become dirty, which will require you to use an action to clean it before you can use it again.

originalText: Shoot forth a fiery blast of smoke that deals 7 damage. All squares adjacent of the target hit by this attack become filled with smoke making it hard to see or move through.

originalText: Creates a barrier around you which prevents projectiles and foes from entering. The barrier lasts only a single round of combat.

originalText: Deals 3 damage. On Critical Hits, 3 Monkey Fish join your party permanently.
