description: Anytime your Allies use hit points or take damage, drain it from your Shield instead. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime your Allies use Stamina or take Damage, drain it from your Shield instead.

name: Bonewall
description: Restore all of your hit points when you kill a creature. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Restore all of your Stamina when you kill a Target.

name: Electrocutor
description: Anytime you deal damage to a creature, drain all current shield and deal that much damage to the creature. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime you deal damage to a Target, drain all current shield and deal that much damage to the Target.

name: Shroom Cap
description: Your rolls are now inverted. You may destroy this Treasure at any time, even to change the outcome of a roll. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Your rolls are now inverted. You may destroy this Treasure at any time, even to change the outcome of a roll.

name: Mirror Shield
description: A large shield with a shiny silver surface that reflects back like a mirror. You may roll to reflect projectiles back at the creature. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A large shield with a shiny silver surface that reflects back like a mirror. You may roll to reflect projectiles back at the Target.

name: Bloody Bulwark
description: Reduce your Maximum Health down to 15 and increase the size of this Shield by 3 for each point of hit points. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Reduce your Maximum Health down to 15 and increase the size of this Shield by 3 for each point of Stamina.

name: Health Potion Glass Shield
description: You may heal adjacent Allies by spending Shield. This can be done at anytime. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You may heal adjacent Allies by spending Shield. This can be done at anytime.

name: Sacrificial Guard
description: Ignore the first natural 20 you take and then destroy this treasure card. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Ignore the first Critical Hit you take and then destroy this treasure card.

name: Ruby Press
description: Anytime you spend Shield, gain 100 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime you spend Shield, gain 100 gold.

name: War Door
description: Anytime your Companion takes damage, drain it from your Shield instead. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime your Companion takes damage, drain it from your Shield instead.

name: Midas Touch
description: Pick up some rocks or rubble and transform them into gold coins. Grant yourself 100 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Pick up some rocks or rubble and transform them into gold coins. Grant yourself 100 gold.

name: Inscribe-O-Matic
description: Conjure a random Spell Scroll. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Conjure a random Spell Scroll.

name: Amplification Wand
description: Scream insults through a sound amplifying wand forcing most creatures who hear it to focus their attacks on you. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Scream insults through a sound amplifying wand forcing most Foes who hear it to focus their attacks on you.

name: Frost Bomb
description: Freeze all creatures on the battlefield, your Allies may roll to resist this effect. Freezing creatures prevents one of their Regular actions this round Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Freeze all Targets on the battlefield, your Allies may roll to resist this effect. Freezing Targets prevents one of their Regular actions this round

name: Arcane Absorbo
description: Counter an incoming Spell creatureted at you or an Ally and restore 3 hit points to yourself. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Counter an incoming Spell Targetted at you or an Ally and restore 3 Stamina to yourself.

name: Golden Gun
description: Fire a Bullet that does 1d4 damage for every 100 gold you have and then cut your gold in half, rounded down. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Fire a Bullet that does 1 Damage for every 100 gold you have and then cut your gold in half, rounded down.

name: Invisibility Cloak
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. You, your clothing, weapons, armor and items become invisible for this round of combat. This invisibility breaks if any of your Allies go or are Unconscious.
originalText: You, your clothing, weapons, armor and items become invisible for this round of combat. This invisibility breaks if any of your Allies go or are Unconscious.

name: Glacial Prisonator
description: Blast a creature with Ice for 1d8 damage and then summon a pillar of ice in all empty adjacent 5-foot squares. These pillars are Walled Terrain. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Blast a Target with Ice for 5 damage and then summon a pillar of ice in all empty adjacent spaces. These pillars are Walled Terrain.

name: Fairy Jar
description: Release a flock of Faries that fly out to heal each of your Allies in range for 3 hit points. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Release a flock of Faries that fly out to heal each of your Allies in range for 3 Stamina.

name: Twin Fairies
description: Your Twin Fairies give you two suggestions on what you should do in combat. One is helpful, one is not. You are never sure which is which. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Twin Fairies give you two suggestions on what you should do in combat. One is helpful, one is not. You are never sure which is which.

name: Thorny Choker
description: creatures who attack you take 1d6 damage this round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Foes who attack you take 3 damage this round.

name: Clockadile Oil
description: Cover your body in Clockadile Oil allow you to roll to dodge incoming attacks. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Cover your body in Clockadile Oil allow you to roll to dodge incoming attacks.

name: Randomatic
description: Use a Random Treasure Card Ability Item. Select the creature after drawing the random card. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Use a Random Treasure Card Ability Item. Select the Target after drawing the random card.

name: Parachute Leggings
description: Anytime you use a movement, an Ally may shift up to 5 5-foot squares. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime you use a Move Action, an Ally may shift up to 5 spaces.

name: Veteran Spellblade Medal
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Whenever you use a Spell Ability, you may Basic Attack as an Immediate bonus action.
originalText: Whenever you use a Spell Ability, you may Basic Attack as an Immediate Bonus Action.

name: Twin Dragon Amulet
description: Two Amulets of the Sun and the Moon. Give a copy of this Treasure to an Ally when you acquire it. You can now grant each other hit points and Actions at any time. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Two Amulets of the Sun and the Moon. Give a copy of this Treasure to an Ally when you acquire it. You can now grant each other Stamina and Actions at any time.

name: Arcane Conduit
description: Redirect all Spells (both positive and negative) cast by creatures towards you. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Redirect all Spells (both positive and negative) cast by Foes towards you.

name: Acidic Saliva
description: You may now spit acid as a Basic Attack for 1d8 damage with 10 range. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You may now spit acid as a Basic Attack for 5 Damage with 10 range.

name: Kobold Mastery
description: Rolling Doubles now counts as a natural 20. Only Kobolds may use this passive. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Rolling Doubles now counts as a Critical Success. Only Kobolds may use this passive.

name: Dwarven Mastery
description: You may pass down all Treasure Items with the exception of this one to your next character. Only Dwarves may use this Passive. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You may pass down all Treasure Items with the exception of this one to your next character. Only Dwarves may use this Passive.

name: Elven Mastery
description: Your Spells do not cost hit points. Only Elves may use this passive. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Spells do not cost Stamina. Only Elves may use this passive.

name: Gnome Mastery
description: Gain an additional reaction each round. Only Gnomes may use this passive. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Gain an additional Anytime Action each round. Only Gnomes may use this passive.

name: Porc Mastery
description: All Abilities no longer use hit points. Only Porcs may use this passive. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.
originalText: All Abilities no longer use Stamina. Only Porcs may use this passive.

name: Goblin Mastery
description: You may roll two dice when attempting to steal an Item from shops. Only Goblins may use this Passive. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You may roll two dice when attempting to steal an Item from shops. Only Goblins may use this Passive.

name: Color Blinding Goggles
description: All your Abilities are now dual actions. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: All your Abilities are now dual actions.

name: Spellvamp Pages
description: Anytime you deal damage with a Spell, restore 3 hit points. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Anytime you deal damage with a Spell, restore 3 Stamina.

name: Giant Spells
description: Spells cast at a creature now hit all adjacent creatures as well. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Spells cast at a Target now hit all adjacent Targets as well.

name: Na'Yias Pride
description: Anytime you are knocked Unconscious and your party survives the Battle, your Maximum hit points is increased by 10 permanently and you learn a random Spell. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime you are knocked Unconscious and your party survives the Battle, your Maximum Stamina is increased by 10 permanently and you learn a random Spell.

name: Jet Sneaks
description: You may now choose to Roll when moving, if you do you may move as many 5-foot squares equal to your roll. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You may now choose to Roll when moving, if you do you may move as many spaces equal to your roll.

name: Gnomish Scopeye
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Replace one of your eyes with this Gnomish Scopeye. The ranges of all your Abilities and Ranged weapons are now doubled.
originalText: Replace one of your eyes with this Gnomish Scopeye. The ranges of all your Abilities and Ranged weapons are now doubled.

name: Equality Charm
description: Your Maximum hit points is equal to the highest hit points total amongst you and your Allies. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Maximum Stamina is equal to the highest Stamina total amongst you and your Allies.

name: Swift Feather Boots
description: You may now move up to 10 5-foot squares with your movement. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You may now move up to 10 spaces with your Move Action.

name: Heartwall Locket
description: Anytime you or an Ally rolls a natural 20, you may restore 6 hit points to a creature of your choosing. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Anytime you or an Ally rolls a Critical Success, you may restore 6 Stamina to a Target of your choosing.

name: Gnomish Chronometer
description: You have an additional action every round. This machine replaces your characters heart. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You have an additional Regular Action every round. This machine replaces your characters heart.

name: Wiggly Wrench
description: You and your Allies armor always grants at least 15 hit points. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You and your Allies armor always grants at least 15 Stamina.

name: Masterful Ruby
description: Your Class Abilities no longer cost hit points. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Class Abilities no longer cost Stamina.

name: Emerald of Persistence
description: The holder of this Emerald after missing with a Basic Attack, may attempt to attack once more as an Immediate bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: The holder of this Emerald after missing with a Basic Attack, may attempt to attack once more as an Immediate Bonus Action.

name: Blood Gift
description: Your Maximum hit points cannot exceed 30. You have access to all of your Class Abilities and they do not cost hit points. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Maximum Stamina cannot exceed 30. You have access to all of your Class Abilities and they do not cost Stamina.

name: Believer Stone
description: At dawn, roll once on the Treasure table. Until the next dawn, the stone gains the properties of the rolled treasure. The Believer Stone itself cannot be selected.
originalText: At the start of combat, this stone transforms into another Treasure card which will revert back into the Believer Stone at the end of combat.

name: Giants Blood
description: Giants blood courses through your veins which triples the damage you deal with Basic Attacks at the expense of your characters life expectancy. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Giants blood courses through your veins which triples the damage you deal with Basic Attacks at the expense of your characters life expectancy.

name: Combat Banner
description: You and your Allies deal double damage with Basic Attacks in combat. The pattern on this banner is of your choosing. This bonus applies only to weapon attacks made with the item and cannot stack with another doubling or tripling effect.
originalText: You and your Allies deal double damage with Basic Attacks in combat. The pattern on this banner is of your choosing.

name: Lethal Arms
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Replace one of your characters hands with one of your weapons in your Inventory. This weapon becomes cursed, but your damage with Basic Attacks is increased to 7.
originalText: Replace one of your characters hands with one of your weapons in your Inventory. This weapon becomes cursed, but your damage with Basic Attacks is increased to 7.

name: Arcana Sight
description: You now cast Spells through your Eyes. Spell Scrolls are no longer consumables for your characters and can be cast as many times as you like. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You now cast Spells through your Eyes. Spell Scrolls are no longer consumables for your characters and can be cast as many times as you like.

name: Flexible Limbs
description: The range of all your Melee Basic Attacks and Melee Abilities is now 5. Your body can stretch itself like rubber and bend in unfathomable ways. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: The range of all your Melee Basic Attacks and Melee Abilities is now 5. Your body can stretch itself like rubber and bend in unfathomable ways.

name: Mirror Image
description: You have a second copy of yourself at all times. Anytime you Move, you also Move this image. For all intents and purposes, you are both characters at the same time and die if either die. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You have a second copy of yourself at all times. Anytime you Move, you also Move this image. For all intents and purposes, you are both characters at the same time and die if either die.

name: Aetheral Form
description: At anytime you can shift into an Aetheral Form, allowing you to walk through Walled Terrain and other Characters. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: At anytime you can shift into an Aetheral Form, allowing you to walk through Walled Terrain and other Characters.

name: Na'Yias Fury
description: Whenever an Ally goes Unconscious or is Killed, restore all of your hit points and gain Shield equal to your Maximum hit points. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Whenever an Ally goes Unconscious or is Killed, restore all of your Stamina and gain Shield equal to your Maximum Stamina.

name: Ironskin
description: You can never take more than 1d8 damage from an Attack or Ability. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You can never take more than 5 Damage from an Attack or Ability.

name: Omnilinguilism
description: You can speak, write, and understand every Language of every race and creature in the realm. You gain 5 Maximum hit points for every different Race of your Allies. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: You can speak, write, and understand every Language of every race and creature in the realm. You gain 5 Maximum Stamina for every different Race of your Allies.

name: Barbed Flesh
description: Your flesh is mangled and sharp to the touch. Anytime you take damage, deal 1d6 damage back to the creature. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Your flesh is mangled and sharp to the touch. Anytime you take damage, deal 3 damage back to the Target.

name: Grindstone
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. You and your Allies weapons always deal at least 1d8 damage with Basic Attacks.
originalText: You and your Allies weapons always deal at least 5 Damage with Basic Attacks.

name: Hideous Mole
description: Your character has a very hideous mole on their face. You and your Allies are given 500 Gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your character has a very hideous mole on their face. You and your Allies are given 500 Gold.

name: Scared Visage
description: Your character has a large gash over one eye. Reduce the range of your Basic Attacks and Abilities to 3, but you or an Ally gain 1000 Gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your character has a large gash over one eye. Reduce the range of your Basic Attacks and Abilities to 3, but you or an Ally gain 1000 Gold.

name: Missing Arm
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Your character is missing an arm. You can only use one of your Weapon Inventory slots, but you or an Ally gain 1000 gold.
originalText: Your character is missing an arm. You can only use one of your Weapon Inventory slots, but you or an Ally gain 1000 gold.

name: Pegleg
description: Your character is missing a leg. You must roll to move with a chance of falling down, but you and your Allies are given 1000 Gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your character is missing a leg. You must roll to move with a chance of falling down, but you and your Allies are given 1000 Gold.

name: Horrible Odor
description: Your character smells absolutely disgusting to all other characters. Your character cannot have friends or loved ones, but you or an Ally gain 1000 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your character smells absolutely disgusting to all other characters. Your character cannot have friends or loved ones, but you or an Ally gain 1000 gold.

name: Terrible Nickname
description: Your character has a nickname voted on by the Gamemaster and Party that your character must use. You gain 1500 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your character has a nickname voted on by the Gamemaster and Party that your character must use. You gain 1500 gold.

name: Toothless
description: Your character has no teeth and feels pain anytime you laugh or smile. You or an Ally gain 500 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Your character has no teeth and feels pain anytime you laugh or smile. You or an Ally gain 500 gold.

name: Super Sonic Hearing
description: Your characters hearing is dramatically increased, but you are very sensetive to loud noises. You or an Ally gain 500 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your characters hearing is dramatically increased, but you are very sensetive to loud noises. You or an Ally gain 500 gold.

name: Post Traumatic Stress
description: Your character constantly has flash backs to a traumatic event from their past. Anytime you roll a 4 or lower, you must freak out and attack phantom creatures for the rest of the round. You or an Ally gain 1000 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Your character constantly has flash backs to a traumatic event from their past. Anytime you roll a 4 or lower, you must freak out and attack phantom Targets for the rest of the round. You or an Ally gain 1000 gold.

name: Uncontrollable Libido
description: Your character is constantly horny for sexual experiences. You cannot attack Male or Female characters, choose one. You or an Ally gain 500 gold. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Your character is constantly horny for sexual experiences. You cannot attack Male or Female characters, choose one. You or an Ally gain 500 gold.

name: Hiking Boots
description: You are Immune to Difficult Terrain and cannot be pushed or knocked back. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: You are Immune to Difficult Terrain and cannot be pushed or knocked back.

name: Kobold Rabies
description: You may now bite as a Basic Attack that deals 1d8 damage and forces the creature to roll to see if they are inflicted with Kobold Rabies which reduces their chance to breed. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You may now bite as a Basic Attack that deals 6 Damage and forces the Target to roll to see if they are inflicted with Kobold Rabies which reduces their chance to breed.

name: Lucky Rabbit's Foot
description: Your Companion cannot die, but they can still go unconscious. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Companion cannot die, but they can still go unconscious.

name: Scented Candle
description: You are immune to all Mind and Emotional manipulation Abilities. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: You are immune to all Mind and Emotional manipulation Abilities.

name: Balanced Braclet
description: You are immune to Abilities that prevent you from gaining back your actions each round like Stuns and Freezes. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: You are immune to Abilities that prevent you from gaining back your actions each round like Stuns and Freezes.

name: Crystaline Amulet
description: If you would miss while casting a Spell, you may request to Roll again, but must use an additional die for this roll. You may do this as many times as you wish. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: If you would miss while casting a Spell, you may request to Roll again, but must use an additional die for this roll. You may do this as many times as you wish.

name: Friendship Ring
description: You are Immune to all damage done by your Allies. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: You are Immune to all damage done by your Allies.

name: Mind Fist
description: You may now Basic Attack for 1d8 damage to any creature on the battlefield using the power of your mind. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: You may now Basic Attack for 5 damage to any Target on the battlefield using the power of your mind.

name: Mechasurfer
description: Anytime an Ally moves, you may shift up to 3 5-foot squares. Anytime you move, you may move an adjacent Ally with you. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Anytime an Ally moves, you may shift up to 3 spaces. Anytime you move, you may move an adjacent Ally with you.

name: Defensive Background
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. You were trained at a young age to favor defense over offense. You may put a second Armor or Shield Card into a Weapon slot.
originalText: You were trained at a young age to favor defense over offense. You may put a second Armor or Shield Card into a Weapon slot.

name: Book of Magic Mastery
description: Transform one of your Abilities into a random Spell permanently. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Transform one of your Abilities into a random Spell permanently.

name: Pocket Whistle
description: Summon a random Companion to aid you in battle until end of combat. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Summon a random Companion to aid you in battle until end of combat.

name: Deck of Cards
description: You and your Allies play a round of Blackjack. Every Ally that beats the DM has their hit points restored to full where as losers have their remaining hit points cut in half. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: You and your Allies play a round of Blackjack. Every Ally that beats the Game Master has their Stamina restored to full where as losers have their remaining Stamina cut in half.

name: Bronze Fishing Pole
description: Cast a Fishing Line that deals 1d6 damage to a creature and then pulls them as close as possible to you. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Cast a Fishing Line that deals 3 damage to a Target and then pulls them as close as possible to you.

name: Cleric Sticks
description: Throw a Stick that deals 1d4 damage to a creature and then spawns a Snake Minion linked to you in an adjacent 5-foot square of the creature. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Throw a Stick that deals 1 damage to a Target and then spawns a Snake Minion linked to you in an adjacent space of the Target.

name: Fishing Net
description: Throw a Fishing Net onto an Area. creatures inside this Area cannot move this round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Throw a Fishing Net onto an Area. Targets inside this Area cannot move this round.

name: Arcane Blaster
description: Blast a creature with an arcane force that deals 1d8 damage. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Blast a Target with an arcane force that deals 5 damage.

name: Flashback Scroll
description: Recast the Spell of the last Spell Scroll you used. This ability fizzles out if you have not used a Spell Scroll during this combat. Limited Abilities are still limited. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Recast the Spell of the last Spell Scroll you used. This ability fizzles out if you have not used a Spell Scroll during this combat. Limited Abilities are still limited.

name: Ice Spirit Shield
description: Cover your armor in a layer of magic ice that grants you shield equal to your maximum hit points. Spawn a Ice Elemental Minion for every 5 shield granted from this Ability. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Cover your armor in a layer of magic ice that grants you shield equal to your maximum Stamina. Spawn a Ice Elemental Minion for every 5 shield granted from this Ability.

name: Restoration Staff
description: Restore 3 hit points to you or an Ally. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Restore 3 Stamina to you or an Ally.

name: Storm Shock
description: Deal 1d4 damage to all creatures on the battlefield. This Ability is great at destroying Minions. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Deal 1 damage to all Foes on the battlefield. This Ability is great at destroying Minions.

name: Potion Seller's Strongest Potion
description: A drink from this potion doubles the damage you deal with Basic Attacks until end of combat. natural 20s triple the damage you deal with Basic Attacks. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: A drink from this potion doubles the damage you deal with Basic Attacks until end of combat. Critical Hits triple the damage you deal with Basic Attacks.

name: Convoluted Composite Crossbow
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Fire a massive steel bolt that deals 6d6 damage to a creature. This crossbow is very complicated to reload and can only be reloaded out of combat.
originalText: Fire a massive steel bolt that deals 25 Damage to a Target. This crossbow is very complicated to reload and can only be reloaded out of combat.

name: Proudmoore Staff
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Conjure a Frost Elemental Minion linked to you.
originalText: Conjure a Frost Elemental Minion linked to you.

name: Book of Cursed Spells
description: Flip through this book's pages and find a random Spell to cast as an Immediate bonus action. You must complete the casting of this spell or you will lose your mind. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Flip through this book's pages and find a random Spell to cast as an Immediate Bonus Action. You must complete the casting of this spell or you will lose your mind.

name: Ring of Fire
description: Unleash a wave of fire from your ring that deals 1d8 damage in a Line. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Unleash a wave of fire from your ring that deals 5 Damage in a Line.

name: Bladeturn
description: Protect yourself in a bubble making you immune to damage for this round of combat. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: Protect yourself in a bubble making you immune to damage for this round of combat.

name: Holy Canteen
description: Drink water blessed by the light and fully restore all your hit points. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Drink water blessed by the light and fully restore all your Stamina.

name: Wellforn Ruby
description: Rub this Ruby to enhance your mobility and then shift up to 5 5-foot squares. You cannot use this movement to dodge an incoming attack. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Rub this Ruby to enhance your mobility and then shift up to 5 spaces. You cannot use this movement to dodge an incoming attack.

name: Bewitching Mirror
description: As an action, present the mirror to a creature within 30 feet. The creature must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it is trapped inside the mirror and incapacitated. The mirror has AC 12 and 20 hit points. Destroying the mirror releases the creature. The mirror can hold only one creature at a time.
originalText: Reveal this mirror to a Target to attempt to trap them within it removing them from combat. If this mirror is later broken, the Target will be released and this Treasure Card destroyed. Some Targets may have too strong a willpower to be trapped in this mirror.

name: Monocle of Magic Sight
description: While wearing this monocle, you may cast Detect Magic at will. You also have advantage on Arcana and Investigation checks involving magical objects.
originalText: Increases your natural ability to see magic. In combat, the GameMaster share some information about the battle or will reveal the maximum Stamina of a Target of your choice.

name: Everfull Goblet
description: The first Common or Uncommon potion poured into this goblet permanently attunes the goblet to that potion. As a bonus action once on each of your turns, you may drink from the goblet and gain the effects of the stored potion. Once the goblet stores a potion, it can never store a different potion. Rare, Epic, and Legendary potions cannot be stored in the goblet.
originalText: Drinking from this Goblet restores 10 Stamina and grants you a Chaos Action.

name: Ring of the Armsukaa
description: Creates an barrier around yourself which prevents Projectiles and creatures from entering this round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Creates an barrier around yourself which prevents Projectiles and Foes from entering this round.

name: Nobleborn Knife
description: Stab a creature brutally for 8d6 damage with a high chance of killing them. This knife must be cleaned of blood before it can be used to stab again. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Stab a Target brutally for 30 Damage with a high chance of killing them. This knife must be cleaned of blood before it can be used to stab again.

name: Hurricane Bracer
description: Summon forth a Hurricane in a massive Area that Deals 1d8 damage to creatures and then allows you to shift all creatures inside the Area to any empty 5-foot square. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Summon forth a Hurricane in a massive Area that Deals 5 damage to Targets and then allows you to shift all Targets inside the Area to any empty space.

name: Pot Puppy Seeds
description: Plant some Pot Puppy Seeds. At the start of every round, a Pot Puppy Minion will spawn linked to you. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Plant some Pot Puppy Seeds. At the start of every round, a Pot Puppy Minion will spawn linked to you.

name: The Magicians Stone
description: At the start of combat, this stone transforms into a random Spell Ability and then back to this Treasure Card at the end of combat. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: At the start of combat, this stone transforms into a random Spell Ability and then back to this Treasure Card at the end of combat.

name: Stellar Sextant
description: Shift all Allies up to 3 5-foot squares. You cannot use this movement to dodge an incoming attack. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Shift all Allies up to 3 spaces. You cannot use this movement to dodge an incoming attack.

name: Elaphelk Tusk
description: Stab a creature for 1d8 damage with this tusk and pin them a wall or the ground preventing movement this round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Stab a Target for 5 Damage with this tusk and pin them a wall or the ground preventing movement this round.

name: Powdered Elephelk Horn
description: Grants all other Allies an Immediate bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Grants all other Allies an Immediate Bonus Action.

name: Frog Stick Totem
description: Place a frog stick totem on an empty 5-foot square. Allies adjacant to the Frog on a Stick may use their movements as actions. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Place a frog stick totem on an empty space. Allies adjacant to the Frog on a Stick may use their Move Actions as Regular Actions.

name: Lunar Boomerang
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Throw a Boomerang that deals 1d6 damage. You may select up to three creatures to hit with this boomerang.
originalText: Throw a Boomerang that deals 3 Damage. You may select up to three Targets to hit with this boomerang.

name: Rocket Boots
description: Blast forward in a straight line until you hit a wall or barrier, leaving behind a trial of fire that transforms 5-foot squares into 0 hit pointsous Terrain. You can travel through 5-foot squares with other creatures in them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Blast forward in a straight line until you hit a wall or barrier, leaving behind a trial of fire that transforms spaces into Dangerous Terrain. You can travel through spaces with other Targets in them.

name: Knife Slinger
description: Release a flurry of knifes at all adjacent creatures that deal 1d8 damage. natural 20s allow you to use the Knife Slinger again as an Immediate bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Release a flurry of knifes at all adjacent Foes that deal 5 Damage. Critical Hits allow you to use the Knife Slinger again as an Immediate Bonus Action.

name: Hypnoring
description: Hypnotise a weak minded creature into obeying your will. They become your Companion until this ring is destroyed or you attempt to charm another creature. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Hypnotise a weak minded Target into obeying your will. They become your Companion until this ring is destroyed or you attempt to charm another Target.

name: Ancient Book of Cleansing
description: Cure yourself or an Ally in range of any and all negative effects and restore 3 hit points to them by reciting a passage from this book about the faults of modern day healing magic. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Cure yourself or an Ally in range of any and all negative effects and restore 3 Stamina to them by reciting a passage from this book about the faults of modern day healing magic.

name: Firework Launcher
description: Launch four fireworks that fly up and slam down dealing 1d4 damage in an Area. Fireworks may be creatureed at different 5-foot squares. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Launch four fireworks that fly up and slam down dealing 1 Damage in an Area. Fireworks may be Targeted at different spaces.

name: Magnopulser
description: Place your Magnopulser on the ground that starts pumping a beat. At the start of every round, you may shift all creatures on the battlefield 1 5-foot square until it is destroyed. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Place your Magnopulser on the ground that starts pumping a beat. At the start of every round, you may shift all Foes on the battlefield 1 space until it is destroyed.

name: Electronet Pistol
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Fire an electric net that deals 1d6 damage to a creature and prevents them from moving this round.
originalText: Fire an electric net that deals 4 Damage to a Target and prevents them from moving this round.

name: Headcannon Helmet
description: Shoot a firebomb at a creature dealing 1d6 damage. The 5-foot square this ability creatures transforms into 0 hit pointsous Terrain. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Shoot a firebomb at a Target dealing 3 Damage. The space this ability Targets transforms into Dangerous Terrain.

name: Decontructor Bomber
description: Destroy a Treasure Card and lob a bomb of shrapnel that deals 4d6 damage in an Area. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Destroy a Treasure Card and lob a bomb of shrapnel that deals 15 Damage in an Area.

name: Neural Link Gun
description: Release a wavey beam that attempts to mind control a creature. If Successful, your can control the creature and can attack with them with a Basic Attack as an Immediate bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Release a wavey beam that attempts to mind control a Target. If Successful, your can control the Target and can attack with them with a Basic Attack as an Immediate Bonus Action.

name: Soul Drainer
description: Deal 1d4 damage to all creatures in range and restore hit points equal to the amount of damage dealt. This Ability does not effect those who do not possess a soul. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Deal 1 damage to all Foes in range and restore Stamina equal to the amount of damage dealt. This Ability does not effect those who do not possess a soul.

name: Sandshot
description: Shoot a glob of dirty mud at a creature blinding them, dealing 1d4 damage and reducing the range of their Basic Attacks and Abilities down to 1 this round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Shoot a glob of dirty mud at a Target blinding them, dealing 2 Damage and reducing the range of their Basic Attacks and Abilities down to 1 this round.

name: Nova Plume Staff
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Shoot forth a fiery blast of smoke that deals 1d6 damage to a creature. All 5-foot squares adjacent of the creature are filled with smoke transforming them into Difficult Terrain 5-foot squares.
originalText: Shoot forth a fiery blast of smoke that deals 3 Damage to a Target. All spaces adjacent of the Target are filled with smoke transforming them into Difficult Terrain spaces.

name: Fist in a Box
description: Open a small box that shoots out a powerful fist attached to a spring that deals 1d8 damage and knocks creatures back up to 5 5-foot squares. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Open a small box that shoots out a powerful fist attached to a spring that deals 5 Damage and knocks Targets back up to 5 spaces.

name: Deeper Freezer
description: Release a frosty beam of ice that deals 1d4 damage to a creature and freezes a creature in place which prevents one of their Regular actions this round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Release a frosty beam of ice that deals 2 Damage to a Target and freezes a Target in place which prevents one of their Regular actions this round.

name: Arcane Needler
description: Fire up to 5 arcane neddles that deal 1d4 damage that cannot hit the same creature. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Fire up to 5 arcane neddles that deal 2 Damage that cannot hit the same Target.

name: Energy Cannon
description: Fire forth a giant ball of arcane energy that deals 1d6 damage to a creature. natural 20s restore all of your used up Actions, including this one. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Fire forth a giant ball of arcane energy that deals 4 Damage to a Target. Critical Hits restore all of your used up Actions, including this one.

name: Flame Nova Belt
description: Activate your belt which deals 1d8 damage to adjacent creatures by releasing a ring of fire. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Activate your belt which deals 5 Damage to adjacent Targets by releasing a ring of fire.

name: Dungeoneer Encyclopedia
description: A book filled with everything you need to know. In combat, the GameMaster share some information about the battle or will reveal the maximum hit points of a creature of your choice. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A book filled with everything you need to know. In combat, the GameMaster share some information about the battle or will reveal the maximum Stamina of a Target of your choice.

name: Flashing Light Sword
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Slap a creature with this annoying sounding and looking sword that deals 1d6 damage to a creature. If successful, the creature may only Basic Attack and use Abilities directed at you this round.
originalText: Slap a Target with this annoying sounding and looking sword that deals 3 Damage to a Target. If successful, the Target may only Basic Attack and use Abilities directed at you this round.

name: Pocket Portal Device
description: Teleport to creature 5-foot square instantly. If the 5-foot square you are creatureting to has another creature inside it, swap places with them. You cannot activate this to dodge an attack. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Teleport to Target space instantly. If the space you are targetting to has another Target inside it, swap places with them. You cannot activate this to dodge an attack.

name: Trusty Trumpet
description: Play a morale boosting melody to bolster your Allies. For this round of combat, Allies in range of this tune are sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they natural 20ly Fail. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Play a morale boosting melody to bolster your Allies. For this round of combat, Allies in range of this tune are sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they Critically Fail.

name: Quake Maker
description: Smashing the ground with this mace causes the earth to rip apart. Select up to 6 connected 5-foot squares and transform them into Difficult Terrain 5-foot squares dealing 1d8 damage to creatures in these 5-foot squares. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Smashing the ground with this mace causes the earth to rip apart. Select up to 6 connected spaces and transform them into Difficult Terrain spaces dealing 5 damage to Foes in these spaces.

name: Screecher
description: A powerful Ring that lets loose a Banshees Scream that causes all creatures in a Line to take 1d4 damage and be unable to cast spells for this round of combat. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A powerful Ring that lets loose a Banshees Scream that causes all Targets in a Line to take 2 damage and be unable to cast spells for this round of combat.

name: Miny Masty Duplicator
description: A blue and green Wand that when waved causes all of your Minions to create a copy of themselves in an adjacent 5-foot square. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A blue and green Wand that when waved causes all of your Minions to create a copy of themselves in an adjacent space.

name: Windu Morning Star
description: Swing a mace wildly that deals damage equal your roll to a creature. Misses often hit you in the face, luckly the damage is often low. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Swing a mace wildly that deals damage equal your roll to a Target. Misses often hit you in the face, luckly the damage is often low.

name: Grimshade Blade
description: Smite a creature with a shadowy force that deals 1d8 damage. natural 1s spawn a very strong Ageless One who exists only to kill you. This is the Shade of the Grimshade Blade. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Smite a Target with a shadowy force that deals 6 Damage. Critical Failures spawn a very strong Ageless One who exists only to kill you. This is the Shade of the Grimshade Blade.

name: Headhunter Axe
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Throw an Axe that deals 6d6 damage to a creature has a high chance of decapitating weaker characters.
originalText: Throw an Axe that deals 20 Damage to a Target has a high chance of decapitating weaker characters.

name: Shillelagh
description: Curse a creature dealing 1d8 damage and forcing them to speak in a strange language, preventing Spells and Anytimes from being used this round.. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Curse a Target dealing 5 Damage and forcing them to speak in a strange language, preventing Spells and Anytimes from being used this round..

name: Rod of the Monkey Fish
description: Cast a Fishing line dealing 1d4 damage to a creature and summon a Monkey Fish Companion to aid you in battle until end of combat. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Cast a Fishing line dealing 1 Damage to a Target and summon a Monkey Fish Companion to aid you in battle until end of combat.

name: Handcannon
description: Fire off a giant cannon ball that deals 1d6 damage to all creatures in a Large Line. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Fire off a giant cannon ball that deals 4 Damage to all Targets in a Large Line.

name: Power Leveler
description: Inject an Ally with pure concecrated E.X.P. granting them 3 Immediate bonus actions. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Inject an Ally with pure concecrated E.X.P. granting them 3 Immediate Bonus Actions.

name: Transmogifer
description: Transform into a Random Companion granting you their Abilities to use until end of combat. You must have 5-foot square for these abilities in your Inventory to properly use this machine. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Transform into a Random Companion granting you their Abilities to use until end of combat. You must have space for these abilities in your Inventory to properly use this machine.

name: Tome of Slime Walls
description: Select up to 4 connected 5-foot squares and transform them into Walled Terrain by summoning giant pillars of green slime. These slime walls are very sticky and hard to remove, so considerate placement is very much manditory. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Select up to 4 connected spaces and transform them into Walled Terrain by summoning giant pillars of green slime. These slime walls are very sticky and hard to remove, so considerate placement is very much manditory.

name: Ice Lancer
description: Sling a lance made of Ice that deals 1d8 damage. Rolling a natural 20 success causes all creatures adjacent of the point of impact to also take 1d8 damage. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Sling a lance made of Ice that deals 5 damage. Rolling a Critical success causes all Targets adjacent of the point of impact to also take 5 damage.

name: Bolt Staff
description: Summon down a bolt of lightning on a creature that deals 1d6 damage and stuns them which prevents one of their Regular actions this round. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Summon down a bolt of lightning on a Target that deals 4 Damage and stuns them which prevents one of their Regular actions this round.

name: Lifetapper
description: Wave this wand to deal 1d6 damage to a creature and restores hit points equal to the amount of damage dealt. Your creature must be living in order to restore hit points. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Wave this wand to deal 3 damage to a Target and restores Stamina equal to the amount of damage dealt. Your target must be living in order to restore Stamina.

name: Chronomina Maxer Clock
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Disappear from the Battlefield. At the end of the next round, reappear on the battlefield and grant yourself 5 Chaos Actions.
originalText: Disappear from the Battlefield. At the end of the next round, reappear on the battlefield and grant yourself 5 Chaos Actions.

originalText: You may Move as many spaces and as many times until the end of this round by transforming into the wind it's self.

name: Swirly Umbrella
description: Warp a creatures mind making them believe they are a pet that belongs to you. This creature becomes your companion until end of combat. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Warp a Targets mind making them believe they are a pet that belongs to you. This Target becomes your companion until end of combat.

name: Bloodlust Book
description: Reading from this book throws you, Allies, and Friendly Minions into a frenzy causing their Basic Attacks to deal double damage this round. This bonus applies only to weapon attacks made with the item and cannot stack with another doubling or tripling effect.
originalText: Reading from this book throws you, Allies, and Friendly Minions into a frenzy causing their Basic Attacks to deal double damage this round.

originalText: Attempt to Parry an attack or projectile with this small dagger. If successful you can counterattack with it to deal 3 damage.

originalText: Fire a Hook into a Target dealing 3 damage and pulling them as close as possible to you, or pulling you as close as possible to them.

originalText: All of your current Minions explode dealing 10 damage to all Adjacent Targets. You may shift all Minions 5 spaces before detonating them.

originalText: Help a wounded or Unconscious Ally with a splash them with Thor's Ale, restoring 10 Stamina.

originalText: Redirect a Projectile fired by a Target at any other Target of your choice.

originalText: Chain up to two Targets together or to the ground preventing them from moving this round.
