name: Elaphelk Tusk
description: Stab a creature with an Elaphelk Tusk dealing 8d6 damage and Stunning them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Stab a Target with an Elaphelk Tusk dealing 30 Damage and Stunning them.

name: Powdered Elaphelk Horn
description: A giant jar of premium elaphelk horn powder that when inhaled hypes you and your party in battle. Grants all other Allies a bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A giant jar of premium elaphelk horn powder that when inhaled hypes you and your party in battle. Grants all other Allies a Bonus Action.

name: Frog Stick Totem
description: Place a frog stick totem on an adjacent empty 5-foot square, transforming it into walled Terrain. Allies adjacent to the Frog on a Stick may use their movements as actions. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Place a frog stick totem on an adjacent empty space, transforming it into walled Terrain. Allies adjacent to the Frog on a Stick may use their Move Actions as Regular Actions.

name: Lunar Boomerang
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. At the DM's discretion it may count as a +2 magic weapon. Throw a boomerang that deals 4d6 damage at up to 3 creatures. If thrown in roughly the shape of a crescent moon, this Ability deals 6d6 damage instead.
originalText: Throw a boomerang that deals 15 Damage at up to 3 Targets. If thrown in roughly the shape of a crescent moon, this Ability deals 25 Damage instead.

name: Rocket Boots
description: Blast forward in a straight line until you hit a wall or barrier, leaving behind a trail of fire that transforms 5-foot squares into 0 hit pointsous Terrain. You can travel through 5-foot squares with other creatures in them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Blast forward in a straight line until you hit a wall or barrier, leaving behind a trail of fire that transforms spaces into Dangerous Terrain. You can travel through spaces with other Targets in them.

name: Knife Slinger
description: Release a flurry of knives at all adjacent creatures that deal 6d6 damage. natural 20s cause you to use this Ability again as automatic bonus actions. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Release a flurry of knives at all adjacent Foes that deal 20 Damage. Critical Hits cause you to use this Ability again as No-Roll Bonus Actions.

name: Hypnoring
description: Hypnotise a weak minded creature into obeying your will, Charming them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Hypnotise a weak minded Target into obeying your will, Charming them.

name: Ancient Book of Cleansing
description: Cure yourself or an Ally in range of any and all negative effects and fully restore their hit points by reciting a passage from this book about the faults of modern day healing magic. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Cure yourself or an Ally in range of any and all negative effects and fully restore their Stamina by reciting a passage from this book about the faults of modern day healing magic.

name: Firework Launcher
description: Launch 20 fireworks that fly up and slam down dealing 1d4 damage in an Area. Fireworks may be creatureed at different Areas. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Launch 20 fireworks that fly up and slam down dealing 1 Damage in an Area. Fireworks may be Targeted at different Areas.

name: Magnopulser
description: Place one of your Magnopulsers on an empty 5-foot square that transforms it into Walled Terrain. At the start of every round, you may pull all creatures on the Battlefield as close as possible to the Magnopulser, destroying it in the process. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Place one of your Magnopulsers on an empty space that transforms it into Walled Terrain. At the start of every round, you may pull all Foes on the Battlefield as close as possible to the Magnopulser, destroying it in the process.

name: Electronet Pistol
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Fire out an electric net that deals 4d6 damage to a creature and Stunning them.
originalText: Fire out an electric net that deals 15 Damage to a Target and Stunning them.

name: Headcannon Helmet
description: Shoot a cannonball at a creature dealing 6d6 damage and transforms the 5-foot square the creature is on into Rough Terrain. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Shoot a cannonball at a Target dealing 20 Damage and transforms the space the Target is on into Rough Terrain.

name: Deconstructor Manabomber
description: Transmute some Treasure into raw energy and lob it as a manabomb that deals 8d6 damage in an Area. You must destroy a Treasure card when using this Ability. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Transmute some Treasure into raw energy and lob it as a manabomb that deals 50 Damage in an Area. You must destroy a Treasure card when using this Ability.

name: Neural Link Gun
description: Release a wavey beam from this small pistol that attempts to mind control a creature. If Successful, you may control the creature and can attack using them with a Basic Attack as a bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Release a wavey beam from this small pistol that attempts to mind control a Target. If Successful, you may control the Target and can attack using them with a Basic Attack as a Bonus Action.

name: Soul Drainer
description: Drain away part of a Living Beings spirit and deal 2d6 damage to all creatures in range, restoring hit points equal to the amount of damage dealt. creatures must be Living Beings to be affected by this Spell. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Drain away part of a Living Beings spirit and deal 10 damage to all Foes in range, restoring Stamina equal to the amount of damage dealt. Targets must be Living Beings to be affected by this Spell.

name: Sandshot
description: Shoot a glob of dirty mud at a creature dealing 6d6 damage and Blinding them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Shoot a glob of dirty mud at a Target dealing 20 Damage and Blinding them.

name: Midas Touch
description: Touch a creature using this very dangerous glove that quickly turns their blood into gold, forcing them to death saving throw. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Touch a Target using this very dangerous glove that quickly turns their blood into gold, forcing them to Death Roll.

name: Inscribe-O-Matic
description: A small machine that can print Spell Scrolls using it's internal magical catalog. Draw a random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A small machine that can print Spell Scrolls using it's internal magical catalog. Draw a random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory.

name: Amplification Wand
description: Scream insults through a sound amplifying wand that forces creatures who hear it to focus their Basic Attacks and Abilities on you for the rest of the round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Scream insults through a sound amplifying wand that forces Foes who hear it to focus their Basic Attacks and Abilities on you for the rest of the round.

name: Frost Bomb
description: Detonate a Frost Bomb that hits all creatures on the Battlefield for 1d8 damage and Freezing them. You and your Allies may roll to resist this Spell. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Detonate a Frost Bomb that hits all Targets on the Battlefield for 5 Damage and Freezing them. You and your Allies may roll to resist this Spell.

name: Arcane Absorbo
description: Counter an incoming Spell creatureed at you or an Ally in range, by absorbing it into this machine and using the raw energy to fully restore your hit points. You may use your action at anytime when using this Ability. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Counter an incoming Spell Targeted at you or an Ally in range, by absorbing it into this machine and using the raw energy to fully restore your Stamina. You may use your Regular Action at anytime when using this Ability.

name: Golden Gun
description: Shoot a creature with this very powerful pistol that causes a creature to take 8d6 damage and then death saving throw if not already in 0 hit points. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.
originalText: Shoot a Target with this very powerful pistol that causes a Target to take 99 Damage and then Death Roll if not already in Danger.

name: Invisibility Cloak
description: Vanish out of sight making it nearly impossible for creatures to track you. You remain invisible even when you Basic Attack or cast a Spell, but this Spell is broken if another Party Member is put in 0 hit points or you take damage. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Vanish out of sight making it nearly impossible for Foes to track you. You remain invisible even when you Basic Attack or cast a Spell, but this Spell is broken if another Party Member is put in Danger or you take Damage.

name: Glacial Prisonator
description: Blast a creature with Ice for 8d6 damage and then summon a pillar of ice in all empty adjacent 5-foot squares. These pillars are Walled Terrain. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Blast a Target with Ice for 50 damage and then summon a pillar of ice in all empty adjacent spaces. These pillars are Walled Terrain.

name: Fairy Jar
description: Release a flock of fairies that fly out to every Ally on the Battlefield to restore 30 hit points at the end of the round. If the Ally is currently in 0 hit points at the end of the round, revive them right away and then grant them a bonus action to use. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Release a flock of fairies that fly out to every Ally on the Battlefield to restore 30 Stamina at the end of the round. If the Ally is currently in Danger at the end of the round, revive them right away and then grant them a Bonus Action to use.

name: Twin Fairies
description: Your Twin Fairies give you two suggestions on what you should do in combat. One is helpful, one is not. You are never sure which is which. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Your Twin Fairies give you two suggestions on what you should do in combat. One is helpful, one is not. You are never sure which is which.

name: Clockadile Oil
description: Cover yourself or a creature in range with Clockadile Oil which allows them to Dodge attacks as if they were wearing a Shield until end of combat. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Cover yourself or a Target in range with Clockadile Oil which allows them to Dodge attacks as if they were wearing a Shield until end of combat.

name: Deck of Cards
description: You and your Allies play a round of Blackjack. Every Ally that beats the Gamemaster has their hit points fully restored, but losers have their current hit points cut in half. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: You and your Allies play a round of Blackjack. Every Ally that beats the Gamemaster has their Stamina fully restored, but losers have their current Stamina cut in half.

name: Bronze Fishing Pole
description: Cast a Fishing Line that deals 6d6 damage to a creature and then pulls them as close as possible to you. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Cast a Fishing Line that deals 20 Damage to a Target and then pulls them as close as possible to you.

name: Cleric Sticks
description: Throw a Stick that deals 6d6 damage to a creature and then spawns a Snake Minion linked to you in an adjacent 5-foot square of the creature. rolls of 15 or higher allow this minion to attack right away. creatures who take damage from Snake Minions are Poisoned. If your Class is Suncleric, you may purchase this Item for 10 Gold. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Throw a Stick that deals 20 Damage to a Target and then spawns a Snake Minion linked to you in an adjacent space of the Target. High Rolls allow this minion to attack right away. Targets who take Damage from Snake Minions are Poisoned. If your Class is Suncleric, you may purchase this Item for 10 Gold.

name: Fishing Net
description: Throw a Fishing Net onto an Area. creatures inside this Area are Stunned. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Throw a Fishing Net onto an Area. Targets inside this Area are Stunned.

name: Arcane Blaster
description: Blast a creature with an arcane force that channels out through this glove, dealing 1d8 damage to a creature for every copy of this card you have in your Inventory. After using this Ability, add a copy of this Ability into your Inventory and place it on top of this Card. Whenever you natural 1, destroy all copies of this card. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.
originalText: Blast a Target with an arcane force that channels out through this glove, dealing 5 Damage to a Target for every copy of this card you have in your Inventory. After using this Ability, add a copy of this Ability into your Inventory and place it on top of this Card. Whenever you Critical Failure, destroy all copies of this card.

name: Flashback Scroll
description: Recast the Spell of the last Spell Scroll you used. This ability fizzles out if you have not used a Spell Scroll during this combat. Limited Abilities are still limited and Legendary Spells cause you to suffer a terrible headache. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Recast the Spell of the last Spell Scroll you used. This ability fizzles out if you have not used a Spell Scroll during this combat. Limited Abilities are still limited and Legendary Spells cause you to suffer a terrible headache.

name: Ice Spirit Shield-o-Tracker
description: Activate an installed special gnomish mechanical enhancement device that protects you in dire situations by fully restoring of your hit points and spawning an Ice Elemental Minion linked to you for every 5 hit points granted from this Ability. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Activate an installed special gnomish mechanical enhancement device that protects you in dire situations by fully restoring of your Stamina and spawning an Ice Elemental Minion linked to you for every 5 Stamina granted from this Ability.

name: Restoration Staff
description: Fully restore the hit points of an Ally by waving this staff to conjure ancient healing magic. If they are currently in 0 hit points, revive them and grant them a bonus action. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Fully restore the Stamina of an Ally by waving this staff to conjure ancient healing magic. If they are currently in Danger, revive them and grant them a Bonus Action.

name: Storm Shock
description: Activate this small gnomish gizmo that causes a powerful electric storm that deals 8d6 damage to all creatures on the Battlefield. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Activate this small gnomish gizmo that causes a powerful electric storm that deals 30 Damage to all Targets on the Battlefield.

name: Nova Plume Staff
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Shoot forth a fiery blast of smoke that deals 4d6 damage to a creature. All 5-foot squares adjacent to the creature are filled with smoke transforming them into Rough Terrain.
originalText: Shoot forth a fiery blast of smoke that deals 15 Damage to a Target. All spaces adjacent to the Target are filled with smoke transforming them into Rough Terrain.

name: Fist in a Box
description: Open a small mechanical box that shoots out a powerful fist attached to a spring dealing 6d6 damage to a creature and knocking them back 5 5-foot squares. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Open a small mechanical box that shoots out a powerful fist attached to a spring dealing 20 Damage to a Target and knocking them back 5 spaces.

name: Deeper Freezer
description: Release a frosty beam of ice at a creature that deals 6d6 damage and Freezing them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Release a frosty beam of ice at a Target that deals 20 Damage and Freezing them.

name: Arcane Needler
description: Fire up to 25 arcane missiles that deal 1d4 damage each, at up to 25 creatures. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Fire up to 25 arcane missiles that deal 1 Damage each, at up to 25 Targets.

name: Energy Cannon
description: Fire forth a giant ball of arcane energy that deals 1d8 damage to a creature and restores one of your reactions. If you use this Ability as an reaction it deals 6d6 damage, but does not restore an reaction. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Fire forth a giant ball of arcane energy that deals 5 Damage to a Target and restores one of your Anytime Actions. If you use this Ability as an Anytime Action it deals 25 Damage, but does not restore an Anytime Action.

name: Flame Nova Belt
description: Activate your belt which deals 6d6 damage to adjacent creatures by releasing a ring of fire. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Activate your belt which deals 20 Damage to adjacent Targets by releasing a ring of fire.

name: Dungeoneer Encyclopedia
description: A book filled with everything you need to know. When used, the Gamemaster may share some information by answering one of your questions or reveal the maximum hit points of a creature of your choice. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A book filled with everything you need to know. When used, the Gamemaster may share some information by answering one of your questions or reveal the maximum Stamina of a Target of your choice.

name: Flashing Light Sword
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Slap a creature with this annoying sounding and looking sword that deals 6d6 damage to a creature. If successful, the creature may only Basic Attacks and Abilities on you for the rest of this round.
originalText: Slap a Target with this annoying sounding and looking sword that deals 20 Damage to a Target. If successful, the Target may only Basic Attacks and Abilities on you for the rest of this round.

name: Pocket Portal Device
description: A rare and expensive device that allows you to teleport to a 5-foot square instantly. If the 5-foot square you are creatureing to has another creature inside it, swap places with them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: A rare and expensive device that allows you to teleport to a space instantly. If the space you are targeting to has another Target inside it, swap places with them.

name: Trusty Trumpet
description: Play a morale boosting melody to bolster your Allies. For this round of combat, Allies in range of this tune are sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they natural 20ly Fail. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Play a morale boosting melody to bolster your Allies. For this round of combat, Allies in range of this tune are sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they Critically Fail.

name: Quake Maker
description: Smash the ground with this mechanical motor-mace that causes the earth to rip apart. Select up to 6 connected 5-foot squares and transform them into Rough Terrain dealing 1d8 damage to creatures in these 5-foot squares. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: Smash the ground with this mechanical motor-mace that causes the earth to rip apart. Select up to 6 connected spaces and transform them into Rough Terrain dealing 5 Damage to Foes in these spaces.

name: Screecher
description: A powerful Ring that lets loose a banshees scream that deals 4d6 damage to creatures and Silencing them. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: A powerful Ring that lets loose a banshees scream that deals 15 Damage to Targets and Silencing them.

name: Miny Masty Duplicator
description: A blue and green mechanical wand, that when waved causes all of your Minions to create a copy of themselves in an adjacent empty 5-foot square. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A blue and green mechanical wand, that when waved causes all of your Minions to create a copy of themselves in an adjacent empty space.

name: Windu Morning Star
description: Swing a mace wildly that deals massive damage to a creature that is equal to your roll and then multiplied by 10. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Swing a mace wildly that deals massive Damage to a Target that is equal to your roll and then multiplied by 10.

name: Grimshade Blade
description: Smite a creature with a shadowy grimshade magical force that deals 8d6 damage. natural 1s not only destroy this Treasure card, but also spawns a terrible shadow creature. This is the shade of the Grimshade Blade and the Gamemaster will draw a random Companion that has 10 times as much hit points and deals twice as much damage with their Basic Attacks and Abilities with the sole purpose to try and kill you. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Smite a Target with a shadowy grimshade magical force that deals 40 Damage. Critical Failures not only destroy this Treasure card, but also spawns a terrible shadow creature. This is the shade of the Grimshade Blade and the Gamemaster will draw a random Companion that has 10 times as much Stamina and deals twice as much Damage with their Basic Attacks and Abilities with the sole purpose to try and kill you.

name: Headhunter Axe
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. Throw an Axe that deals 6d6 damage to a creature and decapitates them if they fail a death saving throw caused by this Ability.
originalText: Throw an Axe that deals 25 Damage to a Target and decapitates them if they fail a Death Roll caused by this Ability.

name: Shillelagh
description: Curse a creature dealing 6d6 damage and forcing them to speak in a strange language, Silencing them. If the creature is already Silenced, this Ability deals 8d6 damage. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.
originalText: Curse a Target dealing 25 Damage and forcing them to speak in a strange language, Silencing them. If the Target is already Silenced, this Ability deals 40 Damage.

name: Rod of the Monkey Fish
description: Open a wormhole connected to an ocean seabed, that pours out water and aquatic life that transform an Area into Rough Terrain. At the start of every round, summon a Monkey Fish Minion linked to no one in every empty Rough Terrain 5-foot square created by this Ability until end of combat. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Open a wormhole connected to an ocean seabed, that pours out water and aquatic life that transform an Area into Rough Terrain. At the start of every round, summon a Monkey Fish Minion linked to no one in every empty Rough Terrain space created by this Ability until end of combat.

name: Giant Handcannon
description: Fire off a giant cannon ball at creatures that deals 6d6 damage in a Large Line. creatures hit are knocked out of the way. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Fire off a giant cannon ball at Targets that deals 25 Damage in a Large Line. Targets hit are knocked out of the way.

name: Power Leveler
description: Inject an Ally with pure concentrated E.X.P. granting them 4 bonus actions, but then causing them to death saving throw afterwards. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Inject an Ally with pure concentrated E.X.P. granting them 4 Bonus Actions, but then causing them to Death Roll afterwards.

name: Transmogifer
description: Transform into a Random Companion granting you their Abilities to use until end of combat. You must have 5-foot square for these abilities in your Inventory to properly use this machine. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Transform into a Random Companion granting you their Abilities to use until end of combat. You must have space for these abilities in your Inventory to properly use this machine.

name: Tome of the Slime Walls
description: A book that contains the history and knowledge behind the Slime Wall Spell. Select up to 6 connected 5-foot squares and transform them into Walled Terrain by summoning giant pillars of green slime. These slime walls are very sticky and hard to remove. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: A book that contains the history and knowledge behind the Slime Wall Spell. Select up to 6 connected spaces and transform them into Walled Terrain by summoning giant pillars of green slime. These slime walls are very sticky and hard to remove.

name: Ice Lancer
description: Sling a lance made of Ice conjured using a special mechanical bracer that deals 6d6 damage. rolls of 15 or higher cause creatures adjacent to your creature to also take 6d6 damage. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.
originalText: Sling a lance made of Ice conjured using a special mechanical bracer that deals 25 Damage. High Rolls cause Targets adjacent to your Target to also take 25 Damage.

name: Bolt Staff
description: Summon down a bolt of lightning on a creature that deals 2d6 damage and Stunning them. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: Summon down a bolt of lightning on a Target that deals 10 Damage and Stunning them.

name: Lifetapper
description: Wave this wand around to drain part of a creatures spirit, dealing 6d6 damage and then restoring hit points equal to the amount of damage dealt. Your creature must be living in order to restore hit points. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: Wave this wand around to drain part of a Targets spirit, dealing 20 Damage and then restoring Stamina equal to the amount of Damage dealt. Your Target must be living in order to restore Stamina.

name: Chronomina Maxer Clock
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. Activate this small machine at the start of a round to disappear from the Battlefield in a sparkly blue lightning blur. At the end of the round, reappear on the Battlefield and grant yourself 3 bonus actions.
originalText: Activate this small machine at the start of a round to disappear from the Battlefield in a sparkly blue lightning blur. At the end of the round, reappear on the Battlefield and grant yourself 3 Bonus Actions.

name: Wind Tour Scroll
description: By reading this scroll out loud, you may Move as many 5-foot squares and as many times until the end of this round by transforming into the wind. This makes it near impossible to be hit by Basic Attacks and Abilities. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: By reading this scroll out loud, you may Move as many spaces and as many times until the end of this round by transforming into the wind. This makes it near impossible to be hit by Basic Attacks and Abilities.

name: Swirly Umbrella
description: Warp a creatures mind by twirling this umbrella to release a strange manipulation spell, Charming them for the rest of combat. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Warp a Targets mind by twirling this umbrella to release a strange manipulation spell, Charming them for the rest of combat.

name: Bloodlust Book
description: Reading from this book throws you, Allies, and Friendly Minions into a frenzy causing their Basic Attacks to deal Double damage for the rest of round. This bonus applies only to weapon attacks made with the item and cannot stack with another doubling or tripling effect.
originalText: Reading from this book throws you, Allies, and Friendly Minions into a frenzy causing their Basic Attacks to deal Double Damage for the rest of round.

name: Parrying Dagger
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. At the DM's discretion it may count as a +2 magic weapon. Attempt to Parry an Basic Attack or Projectile with this small dagger. If successful, you may counterattack an adjacent creature with this dagger, dealing 8d6 damage.
originalText: Attempt to Parry an Basic Attack or Projectile with this small dagger. If successful, you may counterattack an adjacent Target with this dagger, dealing 99 Damage.

name: Grappling Hook
description: Fire a hook from this pistol at a creature either pulling them as close as possible to you or pulling you as close as possible to them. If Successful, you may then Basic Attack this creature as a automatic bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Fire a hook from this pistol at a Target either pulling them as close as possible to you or pulling you as close as possible to them. If Successful, you may then Basic Attack this Target as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Sacrificial Lamb Bombs
description: Carefully activate this strange machine that causes all Minions on the Battlefield to explode dealing 6d6 damage to all Adjacent creatures. You may move all Minions 3 5-foot squares before they detonate. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: Carefully activate this strange machine that causes all Minions on the Battlefield to explode dealing 25 Damage to all Adjacent Targets. You may move all Minions 3 spaces before they detonate.

name: Thors Ale
description: Help an Ally who is currently in 0 hit points with a splash Thors Ale, reviving them and granting them a bonus action. If the Ally is not in 0 hit points, they become Charmed at the start of the next round from the potency of this alcohol drink. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: Help an Ally who is currently in Danger with a splash Thors Ale, reviving them and granting them a Bonus Action. If the Ally is not in Danger, they become Charmed at the start of the next round from the potency of this alcohol drink.

name: Deflex
description: Using this odd pair of mechanical rods, redirect a Projectile creatureing you at any other creature of your choice. You may use your action as an Interrupt Action when using this Ability. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Using this odd pair of mechanical rods, redirect a Projectile Targeting you at any other Target of your choice. You may use your Regular Action as an Interrupt Action when using this Ability.

name: Wand of Direction
description: Twirl your wand which mesmerizes a creature for a brief moment allowing you to move them up to 5 5-foot squares. rolls of 10 or higher or Higher grant you a automatic bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Twirl your wand which mesmerizes a Foe for a brief moment allowing you to move them up to 5 spaces. Average Rolls or Higher grant you a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Glassical Bracer
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. At the DM's discretion it may count as a +2 magic weapon. Using the Legendary Weapon of the Overseers, gain you access to the inventory of any known deceased Overseer until the end of combat. Whenever you are attacked, you may roll to negate the damage. Low rolls will allow the damage to be dealt. natural 1s will shatter the armour
originalText: Using the Legendary Weapon of the Overseers, gain you access to the inventory of any known deceased Overseer until the end of combat. Whenever you are attacked, you may roll to negate the damage. Low rolls will allow the damage to be dealt. Critical Failures will shatter the armour

name: Mama mia its a spaghet
description: Saaaaaveddd Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: Saaaaaveddd

name: Thunder Spear
description: Fire this armor-penetrating spear at a creature, dealing one quarter of their current hit points. As a No Roll bonus action, you may activate the explosive component of this weapon, dealing an additional 8d6 damage and Stunning your creature. Large tiles are not immune to this Stun. This weapon requires a full turn to reload. For balance, this immunity lasts until the start of your next turn or applies to one triggering effect, then cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.
originalText: Fire this armor-penetrating spear at a Target, dealing one quarter of their current Stamina. As a No Roll Bonus Action, you may activate the explosive component of this weapon, dealing an additional 30 damage and Stunning your Target. Large tiles are not immune to this Stun. This weapon requires a full turn to reload.

name: Blood of the Giants [240G]
description: Your bloodline has been infused with the blood of giants, a boon, or curse to some, given by the Divines in the past to have a servant even be able to stay alive when sparring. Now rarely seen due to the untold power they contain. You become a giant 3x3 Tile and deal Double damage with all Basic Attacks. Your base Basic Attack damage is now 14. This bonus applies only to weapon attacks made with the item and cannot stack with another doubling or tripling effect.
originalText: Your bloodline has been infused with the blood of giants, a boon, or curse to some, given by the Divines in the past to have a servant even be able to stay alive when sparring. Now rarely seen due to the untold power they contain. You become a giant 3x3 Tile and deal Double Damage with all Basic Attacks. Your base Basic Attack Damage is now 14.

name: Muddy Billhook [80G]
description: A dirty billhook knife that is very sharp and very dangerous. Deals 4d6 damage with Basic Attacks. rolls of 15 or higher with melee Basic Attacks cause you to cut a limb off most creatures. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: A dirty billhook knife that is very sharp and very dangerous. Deals 11 Damage with Basic Attacks. High Rolls with melee Basic Attacks cause you to cut a limb off most Targets.

name: Elemental Mage Gauntlet [300G]
description: A gauntlet infused with gems of magical elements. Deals 4d6 damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you use a movement, you may cast a Spell as a bonus action. This effect may only occur once per round. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: A gauntlet infused with gems of magical elements. Deals 13 Damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you use a Move Action, you may cast a Spell as a Bonus Action. This effect may only occur once per round.

name: Death Scythe [170G]
description: A sickly feeling of death looms over this large scythe. Reduce your maximum hit points by half. Deals 6d6 damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you Basic Attack, restore hit points equal to damage dealt. This healing effect can be used once per long rest unless the item is consumable, in which case it is destroyed after use.
originalText: A sickly feeling of death looms over this large scythe. Reduce your maximum Stamina by half. Deals 20 Damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you Basic Attack, restore Stamina equal to damage dealt.

name: Hole Puncher [100G]
description: A wooden slingshot filled with holes. As an Action, it can put a perfectly cylindrical tunnel into any wall that is non-living or non-magical. rolled. The hole's diameter is 1 Space and the depth of the hole is up to 3 Spaces. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A wooden slingshot filled with holes. As an Action, it can put a perfectly cylindrical tunnel into any wall that is non-living or non-magical. rolled. The hole's diameter is 1 Space and the depth of the hole is up to 3 Spaces.

name: Ice Pick [110G]
description: A rapier used in the Nokia conflict that caused it to be cursed with eternal cold. The rapier is cold to the touch, so cold it has icicles around the blade. Deals 2d6 damage with Basic Attacks. You roll with Advantage when casting Ice Spells. When Basic Attacking with this rapier, Rolls 18 and above allow you to cast a random or known Ice Spell as a automatic bonus action. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: A rapier used in the Nokia conflict that caused it to be cursed with eternal cold. The rapier is cold to the touch, so cold it has icicles around the blade. Deals 10 Damage with Basic Attacks. You roll with Advantage when casting Ice Spells. When Basic Attacking with this rapier, Rolls 18 and above allow you to cast a random or known Ice Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Summoning Wand [100G]
description: A pristine wand that empowers summoning magic. Deals 2d6 damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you cast a Spell that summons Minions, summon an additional Minion. Summoned creatures use an appropriate CR 1/8 to CR 1 stat block chosen by the DM, act after your turn, and disappear after 1 minute unless stated otherwise.
originalText: A pristine wand that empowers summoning magic. Deals 9 Damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you cast a Spell that summons Minions, summon an additional Minion.

name: Merchant's Cutlass [100G]
description: A gold encrusted decorative cutlass, often worn by wealthy merchants. Deals 2d6 damage with Basic Attacks. During Character Creation, whenever you or another Party Member buys a card from the Shop, you may draw a random card of the same type and put it into the now empty Shop 5-foot square. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.
originalText: A gold encrusted decorative cutlass, often worn by wealthy merchants. Deals 10 Damage with Basic Attacks. During Character Creation, whenever you or another Party Member buys a card from the Shop, you may draw a random card of the same type and put it into the now empty Shop space.

name: Chime Sword [110G]
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. It counts as a +1 magic weapon. A sharp blade with many charms and trinkets chained to the base of the blade. Deals 2d6 damage with Basic Attacks. Increases your Maximum hit points by 4 for every Passive you have at the end of Character Creation.
originalText: A sharp blade with many charms and trinkets chained to the base of the blade. Deals 10 Damage with Basic Attacks. Increases your Maximum Stamina by 4 for every Passive you have at the end of Character Creation.

name: Offhand Assassin's Dagger [100G]
description: This magic weapon uses the closest standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. A small blade that assassins use as a follow up for the kill. Deals 1d8 damage with Basic Attacks. When you Basic Attack with another Weapons, you may Basic Attack with this Weapon as a bonus action.
originalText: A small blade that assassins use as a follow up for the kill. Deals 5 Damage with Basic Attacks. When you Basic Attack with another Weapons, you may Basic Attack with this Weapon as a Bonus Action.

name: Grimoire [70G]
description: An enchanted book of spells that has been specialized for the schools of magic you regularly practice. Deals 1d10 damage with Basic Attacks. Choose an Element, you gain +2 to Rolls with that Element. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: An enchanted book of spells that has been specialized for the schools of magic you regularly practice. Deals 7 Damage with Basic Attacks. Choose an Element, you gain +2 to Rolls with that Element.

name: Puzzle Box [10G]
description: A small puzzle box used for inspiration. You may spend your movement fiddling with this puzzle box. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A small puzzle box used for inspiration. You may spend your Move Action fiddling with this puzzle box.

name: Double Edge [140G]
description: A long sword with a sharp handle where the tighter the grip the more you bleed. Deals 6d6 damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you Basic Attack, deal 2d6 damage to yourself. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action twice per long rest.
originalText: A long sword with a sharp handle where the tighter the grip the more you bleed. Deals 20 Damage with Basic Attacks. Whenever you Basic Attack, deal 10 Damage to yourself.

name: Adamantine Armor [200G]
description: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. This Armor gives 15 hit points. While wearing it, any natural 20 or roll of 15 or higher against you becomes an roll of 10 or higher. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. This Armor gives 15 Stamina. While wearing it, any Critical Hit or High Roll against you becomes an Average Roll.

name: Armor of Resolve [100G]
description: A sea blue breastplate with robes of red and green wrapped around it, and it has a horn on the right shoulder plate. This Armor gives 10 hit points. Whenever you are below half Maximum hit points, Rolls against you have a -2. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A sea blue breastplate with robes of red and green wrapped around it, and it has a horn on the right shoulder plate. This Armor gives 10 Stamina. Whenever you are below half Maximum Stamina, Rolls against you have a -2.

name: Statistician's Coat [140G]
description: A battle garb worn by generals with a tactical mind. This Armor gives 10 hit points. Once per Combat, as an Action, mark a creature, until the end of the next Round, rolls of 15 or higher against the creature count as natural 20s and Low Rolls become rolls of 10 or higher. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per long rest.
originalText: A battle garb worn by generals with a tactical mind. This Armor gives 10 Stamina. Once per Combat, as an Action, mark a Target, until the end of the next Round, High Rolls against the Target count as Critical Hits and Low Rolls become Average Rolls.

name: Drunk Master Robe [80G]
description: The robes of a master performer and artist, that got wasted before each performance. This Armor gives 10 hit points. Whenever you are about to be hit by any projectile, that projectile is transformed into a random Spell to be hit by instead. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: The robes of a master performer and artist, that got wasted before each performance. This Armor gives 10 Stamina. Whenever you are about to be hit by any projectile, that projectile is transformed into a random Spell to be hit by instead.

name: Regenerative Inkwell [100G]
description: As an Action, create a random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory. rolls of 15 or higher, allow you to choose one between 3 random Spell Scrolls to add to your Inventory. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: As an Action, create a random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory. High Rolls, allow you to choose one between 3 random Spell Scrolls to add to your Inventory.

name: Laughing Amulet [90G]
description: The amulet carries the image of a stylized human face, mouth open in laughter. The wearer may deliver the best taunting joke or victorious one-liner applicable to the current situation. If the jest pleases the DM, you are rewarded by fully restoring hit points. But the DM is a fickle person; jokes that fail are punished with a smite, dealing 25 Arcane/Fire damage. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: The amulet carries the image of a stylized human face, mouth open in laughter. The wearer may deliver the best taunting joke or victorious one-liner applicable to the current situation. If the jest pleases the Game Master, you are rewarded by fully restoring Stamina. But the Game Master is a fickle person; jokes that fail are punished with a smite, dealing 25 Arcane/Fire damage.

name: Statue's Sole [150G]
description: A pair of heavy duty cleats. Using your Movement Action, form a barrier around yourself equal to your Maximum hit points that takes damage before you. While this barrier is active you are unable to Move. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once before it is consumed.
originalText: A pair of heavy duty cleats. Using your Movement Action, form a barrier around yourself equal to your Maximum Stamina that takes Damage before you. While this barrier is active you are unable to Move.

name: Rocket Boots [100G]
description: Once per Combat, as a bonus action, blast forward in a straight line until you hit a wall or barrier, leaving behind a trail of fire that transforms 5-foot squares into 0 hit pointsous Terrain. You can travel through 5-foot squares with other creatures in them, and if so deal 6d6 damage to those creatures. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action once per short or long rest.

name: Arcane Blaster [100G]
description: Blast a creature with an arcane force that channels out through this glove, dealing 1d6 damage to a creature for every copy of this card you have in your Inventory. After using this Ability, add a copy of this Ability into your Inventory and place it on top of this Card. Whenever you natural 1, destroy all copies of this card. Unless otherwise stated, this treasure can be activated as an action three times per long rest.

Strike: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 3 cold damage.
Freezing Hit (1/Turn): On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the companion's next turn.
originalText: A frosty Elven Hydromancer Companion. Elven Hydromancers have access to the Torpedo EX, Glaciate EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Kobold Hydromancer
description:
Strike: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6 + 4 cold damage.
Freezing Hit (1/Turn): On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the companion's next turn.
originalText: A nimble Kobold Hydromancer Companion. Kobold Hydromancers have access to the Frost Disc EX, Bladeturn EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Porcish Hydromancer
description:
Strike: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 + 5 piercing damage.
Summon Minions (1/Long Rest): Summon 1d4 Tiny minions with 1 HP each. They act immediately after this companion and vanish after 1 minute or when destroyed.
originalText: A summoning Porcish Hydromancer Companion. Porcish Hydromancers have access to the Fog of Maddening EX, Magical Schooling EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Elven Flamedanseur
description: Strike: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6 + 4 fire damage.
originalText: A fiery Elven Flamedanseur Companion. Elven Flamedanseurs have access to the Firekick EX, Bathed in Lafeu EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Gnomish Flamedanseur
description: Strike: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6 + 4 fire damage.
originalText: A powerful Gnomish Flamedanseur Companion. Gnomish Flamedanseurs have access to the Lava Axe EX, Calm Lafeu EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Kobold Flamedanseur
description:
Bite: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6 + 4 fire damage.
Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6): Creatures in a 15-foot cone make a DC 16 Dexterity save, taking 3d6 fire damage on a failure, or half as much on a success.
originalText: A dangerous Kobold Flamedanseur Companion. Kobold Flamedanseurs have access to the Dragonfire EX, Magma Stomp EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Elven Deathknight
description: Strike: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6 + 4 necrotic damage.
originalText: A commanding Elven Deathknight Companion. Elven Deathknights have access to the Deathstrike EX, Command the Dead EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Dwarven Deathknight
description: Strike: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 + 5 necrotic damage.
originalText: A ageless making Dwarven Deathknight Companion. Dwarven Deathknights have access to the Bitterblaze EX, Resurrection EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Porcish Deathknight
description:
Strike: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 + 5 cold damage.
Freezing Hit (1/Turn): On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the companion's next turn.
originalText: A rotting Porcish Deathknight Companion. Porcish Deathknights have access to the Rotting Frost EX, Frostgrip EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Dwelf Deathknight
description:
Strike: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 + 5 cold damage.
Freezing Hit (1/Turn): On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the companion's next turn.
originalText: A dark Dwelf Deathknight Companion. Dwelf Deathknights have access to the Dark Mending EX, Ice Wraith EX, and Personality Companion Abilities.

name: Giant Lizard
description:
Ranged Attack: +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 + 5 poison damage.
Venomous Strike (1/Turn): On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution save or be Poisoned until the end of its next turn.
Resilient Form: The companion has resistance to poison damage and advantage on saving throws against magical effects of that type.
originalText: The Giant Lizard of the Witch of the Swamp. At the end of every round, either spit acid at a target that deals 10 damage and poisons them, or lunge and bite down on them, dealing 20 damage. This Companion is resistant ag...

name: Mummy
description: Strike: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 + 5 necrotic damage.
originalText: Mummies are a unique class of undead that are distinct from the Ageless. Mummies have access to the Pharaoh's Curse, Honey Bandage, and Dust Devil Companion Abilities. You may only have 1 Mummy Companion.

name: Scrooge [400G]
description: Strike: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 3 piercing damage.
originalText: Nobody knows how these geese gained sentience, or why they have an affinity for gang violence, but this one at least hasn't broken your kneecaps... yet

name: Eaglebear
description: Strike: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6 + 4 piercing damage.
originalText: Eaglebears are strong loyal Companions with the face and wings of an eagle and the body of a bear.

name: Gore
description: As an Action, the companion makes a melee attack against one creature within its reach. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 piercing damage. If the target is a lesser creature at the DM's discretion, a natural 20 may kill it outright; otherwise the hit deals an extra 2d8 piercing damage.
originalText: Spear a foe clear through with your tusk dealing 5 damage. This skill has a high chance of instantly killing lesser foes.

name: Swipe
description: As an Action, the companion sweeps a 20-foot line. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 slashing damage and be pushed 5 feet in a direction chosen by the companion. On a success, they take half damage and are not pushed.
originalText: Swipe up to 4 spaces directly in front of you for 3 Damage. Targets hit may be pushed 1 space in any direction of your choosing.

name: Ride
description: A willing creature of the companion's size or smaller may mount it. While mounted, the rider uses the companion's movement. Once per round, when the rider would be hit by an attack, the companion may use its Reaction to become the target instead.
originalText: Allow another Target to ride on your back. While being rode, you may move up to 7 spaces each turn and may intercept attacks and spells on behalf of the rider.

name: Roar
description: As an Action, each hostile creature within 30 feet that can hear the companion must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is Frightened of the companion until the end of its next turn.
originalText: Let loose a powerful roar which forces all Foes who hear it to roll in fear. Feared Foes behave cowardly and are less likely to attack this round.

name: Bite
description: As an Action, the companion moves up to 15 feet and makes a melee attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 piercing damage. If the attack hits, the companion may immediately use one different companion ability as a Bonus Action.
originalText: Dart forward up to 3 spaces and attack for 3 damage. If this attack does not miss, you gain an Immediate Bonus Action to use on another Companion Skill other than Bite.

name: Dodge
description: When the companion is hit by an attack or targeted by a projectile, it may use its Reaction to move up to 15 feet without provoking opportunity attacks. If this movement takes it out of range or line of effect, the attack misses.
originalText: Roll up to 3 spaces away at blinding speeds. This ability can be used to dodge an incoming attack or projectile.

name: Delusion Spray
description: Spray a hostile creature in a purple mist that deals 6d6 damage. On the hostile creatures turn, they must roll to see if they are burdened with hallucinations that change how they react in battle.
originalText: Spray a Foe in a purple mist that deals 15 damage. On the Foes turn, they must roll to see if they are burdened with hallucinations that change how they react in battle.

name: Little Hat Trick
description: Pull a random Spell from your hat and attempt to cast it. This Spell does not cost hit points. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Pull a random Spell from your hat and attempt to cast it. This Spell does not cost stamina.

name: Teleport
description: As an Action, the companion teleports up to 50 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. If a creature of similar size occupies the destination space, that creature must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or swap places with the companion.
originalText: Attempt to teleport up to 10 spaces. If the space you want to teleport to has a another Target of similar size in it, you may switch places with that Target.

name: Vanish
description: As an Action, the companion becomes invisible and leaves the battlefield. It may reappear in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of its bonded character when combat ends or when an ally within 30 feet is reduced to 0 hit points.
originalText: Disappear from the battle entirely. You may only re-appear once out of combat or in reaction to an Ally in eminent danger.

name: Gore
description: As an Action, the companion makes a melee attack against one creature within its reach. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 piercing damage. If the target is a lesser creature at the DM's discretion, a natural 20 may kill it outright; otherwise the hit deals an extra 2d8 piercing damage.
originalText: Spear a Foe clean through with your tusk dealing 5 Damage. This skill has a high chance of instantly killing lesser Foes.

name: Quake
description: As an Action, choose up to eight 5-foot squares within 60 feet. Those spaces become difficult terrain for 1 minute. A creature standing in one of those spaces must make a Strength saving throw or be moved 5 feet to an adjacent space chosen by the companion.
originalText: Slam the ground causing tremors to rip the earth apart. Select up to 8 spaces and transform them into Difficult Terrain spaces. If you select a space with a Target on it, shift them one space out of the way.

name: Slither
description: As a Bonus Action, the companion moves to an unoccupied space it can see within 60 feet without provoking opportunity attacks. This may be used once at the start of combat before initiative is resolved.
originalText: Slither quickly to any empty space in line of sight. This skill can be used at the very start of combat as an Immediate Bonus Action, and still used a second time in combat.

name: Whisper
description: As an Action, one creature within 5 feet that can hear the companion must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is charmed until the end of its next turn and must use its movement or action in a way the DM considers unhelpful to its allies.
originalText: Softly whisper into the ear of an unsuspecting foe. If successful, they will be forced to play Anti Party this round.

name: Empower
description: As an Action, choose one allied creature within 30 feet. Until the end of that creature's next turn, the first weapon attack it hits with deals one additional weapon damage die.
originalText: Empower a Target that causes them to deal double damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat.

name: Channel
description: As an Action, choose one allied creature within 30 feet. The next leveled spell or limited-use ability that ally uses before the end of its next turn does not expend its lowest required resource, at the DM's discretion.
originalText: Reduce the Stamina cost of an Allies abilities to zero this round.

name: Dispel
description: As an Action, choose one creature within 30 feet. End one magical effect on that creature if the effect is 3rd level or lower. For stronger effects, make an ability check using the companion's proficiency bonus against DC 10 + the effect's level.
originalText: Cleanse a Target of any negative magical effects or enhancements.

name: Amplifying Crystal
description: Summon 3 giant amplifying crystals into 15 feet of your choice. Line and Projectile Spells cast at one of these crystals can be bounced to other crystals to hit multiple targets or increase the effective range of the Spell. You gain a flex action after using this Ability.
originalText: Summon 3 giant amplifying crystals into 3 spaces of your choice. Line and Projectile Spells cast at one of these crystals can be bounced to other crystals to hit multiple targets or increase the effective range of the Spell. You gain a Chaos Action after using this Ability.

name: Gem Beam
description: Shoots forth a penetrating beam in a line that deals 2d6 damage to all creatures it hits. Gemlings and Gemlords are immune to this damage.
originalText: Shoots forth a penetrating beam in a line that deals 5 Damages to all Targets it hits. Gemlings and Gemlords are immune to this Damage.

name: Slap
description: As an Action, the companion makes a melee attack with advantage. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage. Tiny or smaller targets are automatically hit unless the DM rules otherwise.
originalText: Slap a Foe for 4 damage. This attack cannot miss and does not require a roll to use.

name: Splash
description: As an Action, one creature within 10 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it has disadvantage on the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the end of its next turn.
originalText: Bounce up and down attempting to distract a Foe preventing one of their Regular actions this round.

name: Howl
description: As an Action, hostile creatures within 30 feet that can hear the companion must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, they have disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures other than the companion until the start of the companion's next turn.
originalText: Howl loudly causing nearby Foes to be more likely to focus their attacks on you.

name: Firebolt
description: As an Action, make a ranged spell attack against a creature within 60 feet. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 fire damage. On a natural 20, each creature within 5 feet of the target takes 2d10 fire damage.
originalText: Hurl a ball of fire that deals 5 Damage at a Target. Rolling a Critical Success, causes all Targets adjacent of the point of impact to also take 10 Damage.

name: Firewall
description: As an Action, create a 15-foot line of magical flame in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet. The wall lasts 1 minute. A creature that enters the wall for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there takes 2d6 fire damage.
originalText: Create a Firewall in 3 connected empty spaces and transform them into Dangerous Terrain spaces.

name: Awaken
description: When the companion is reduced to 0 hit points, it may use this ability without an action to regain hit points equal to half its maximum hit points. Once used, it cannot be used again until the next dawn.
originalText: Completely restore the Stamina of your Companion. This ability can be used when Unconcious.

name: Slam
description: As an Action, the companion makes a melee attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 bludgeoning damage. On a natural 20, roll the damage dice three times instead of twice.
originalText: Slam down on a Foe dealing 5 Damage. Deals triple Damage damage on Critical Hits.

name: Restoring Rain
description: Summon forth a powerful rain cloud that heals allies inside it for 3 hit points. All hostile creatures of average or high intelligence to focus on you this round.
originalText: Summon forth a powerful rain cloud that heals Allies inside it for 3 Stamina. All Foes of average or high intelligence to focus on you this round.

name: Wind Gust
description: Deal 1d6 damage to a creature and knock them back up to 50 feet.
originalText: Deal 3 damage to a Target and knock them back up to 10 spaces.

name: Mighty Breeze
description: Summon a mighty breeze and shift up to 3 creatures 15 feet in a single direction.
originalText: Summon a mighty breeze and shift up to 3 Targets 3 spaces in a single direction.

name: Bash
description: Bash a creature dealing 2d6 damage. creatures who have been bashed must roll to move this round.
originalText: Bash a Target dealing 5 Damage. Targets who have been bashed must roll to move this round.

name: Hand of the Deep
description: Summons forth vines from the earth below that grasp onto a creature's legs preventing them from moving this round.
originalText: Summons forth vines from the earth below that grasp onto a Target's legs preventing them from moving this round.

name: Throw
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Throw a creature up to 25 feet at an empty space. If you throw a creature onto a space adjacent to an ally, they may use a Basic Attack as an Bonus Action against this creature.
originalText: Throw a Target up to 5 spaces at an empty space. If you throw a Target onto a space adjacent to an ally, they may use a Basic Attack as an Immediate Bonus Action against this Target.

name: Sunlight
description: Restore all of your Companions hit points and restores 15 of your hit points. This ability can only be used if in direct sunlight.
originalText: Restore all of your Companions Stamina and restores 15 of your Stamina. This ability can only be used if in direct sunlight.

name: Moonlight
description: Grant you or an ally 2 Bonus Actions. This ability can only be used if in direct Moonlight.
originalText: Grant you or an Ally 2 Immediate Bonus Actions. This ability can only be used if in direct Moonlight.

name: Drink
description: Restore 3 hit points and reduces all damage you take down to 5 this round.
originalText: Restore 3 Stamina and reduces all Damage you take down to 5 this round.

name: Salvage
description: Destroy a Treasure and draw a new Treasure to replace it. Using this ability out of combat will prevent you from using it in your next combat encounter.
originalText: Destroy a Treasure and draw a new Treasure to replace it. Using this ability out of combat will prevent you from using it in your next combat encounter.

name: Prayer
description: Make a quick Prayer to the Light and grant 6 Shield to a creature.
originalText: Make a quick Prayer to the Light and grant 6 Shield to a Target.

name: Ice Bolt
description: Release a shard of ice moving at high speeds that deals 2d6 damage.
originalText: Release a shard of ice moving at high speeds that deals 5 damage.

name: Freeze
description: Freeze a creature in a block of ice, preventing one of their Regular actions this round. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Freeze a Target in a block of ice, preventing one of their Regular actions this round.

name: Disperse
description: Disperse yourself as a blast of healing water that heals allies in range for 15 hit points.
originalText: Disperse yourself as a blast of healing water that heals Allies in range for 15 Stamina.

name: Peck
description: Peck a creature for 2d6 damage. natural 20es grant you an Bonus Action to use a Companion Ability.
originalText: Peck a Target for 5 Damage. Critical Successes grant you an Immediate Bonus Action to use a Companion Ability.

name: Flap
description: Flap your arms/wings and push a creature back 25 feet. If they hit another creature or Wall, they take 2d6 damage. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Flap your arms/wings and push a Target back 5 spaces. If they hit another Target or Wall, they take 5 damage.

name: Ray of Ice
description: Encase a creature in ice dealing 1d6 damage and preventing one of their Regular actions this round.
originalText: Encase a Target in ice dealing 3 Damage and preventing one of their Regular actions this round.

name: Tongue Lash
description: Whip out your Tongue at a creature dealing 1d6 damage and pulling them as close as possible to you. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Whip out your Tongue at a Target dealing 3 Damage and pulling them as close as possible to you.

name: Swallow
description: Swallow a creature whole placing them in your stomach which is a small 3x3 Area. Deal 2d6 damage at the start of every round to all creatures inside you. If you go Unconscious, all creatures inside you are expelled Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Swallow a Target whole placing them in your stomach which is a small 3x3 Area. Deal 5 Damage at the start of every round to all Targets inside you. If you go Unconscious, all Targets inside you are expelled

name: Moan
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Moan out in pain or pleasure which can distract creatures and interupt attacks and abilities.
originalText: Moan out in pain or pleasure which can distract Targets and interupt attacks and abilities.

name: Ram
description: Ram a creature dealing 2d6 damage and then knocking them back 50 feet. You may chase the creature after knocking them back by shifting as many spaces as you like to get as close as possible.
originalText: Ram a Target dealing 4 Damage and then knocking them back 10 spaces. You may chase the Target after knocking them back by shifting as many spaces as you like to get as close as possible.

name: Leap
description: Leap forward shifting yourself up to 25 feet. hostile creatures adjacent to where you land take 1d6 damage.
originalText: Leap forward shifting yourself up to 5 spaces. Foes adjacent to where you land take 3 Damage.

name: Slash
description: Slash at a creature dealing 2d6 damage. Anytime Slash is used as an Bonus Action, you may use it Three times.
originalText: Slash at a Target dealing 5 Damage. Anytime Slash is used as an Immediate Bonus Action, you may use it Three times.

name: Vine Lash
description: Grab with your long arms a creature dealing 1d6 damage and preventing them from moving this round.
originalText: Grab with your long arms a Target dealing 3 damage and preventing them from moving this round.

name: Leaf Shield
description: Block a projectile out of the air by whipping a caramelized leaf at it.
originalText: Block a projectile out of the air by whipping a caramelized leaf at it.

name: Tunnel
description: Tunnel into the ground and reappear at creature empty space. All spaces around the creature space become difficult terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Tunnel into the ground and reappear at Target empty space. All spaces around the Target space become Difficult Terrain.

name: Sprint
description: Sprint and shift up to 50 feet. If you move through the space of another creature, you may push them 5 feet out of the way in a direction of your choice. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Sprint and shift up to 10 spaces. If you move through the space of another Target, you may push them 1 space out of the way in a direction of your choice.

name: Steal
description: Attempt to steal 100 gold from a creature. natural 20s grant you a random Treasure Item.
originalText: Attempt to steal 100 gold from a Target. Critical Hits grant you a random Treasure Item.

name: Deathflame
description: Hurl a ball of toxic death that deals 2d6 damage in a Line.
originalText: Hurl a ball of toxic death that deals 4 Damage in a Line.

name: Bone Minion
description: Summon a Bone minion linked to you.
originalText: Summon a Bone minion linked to you.

name: Worship
description: All Friendly Minions begin to worship the Dragon Aspects to heal an ally for 1 hit points each.
originalText: All Friendly Minions begin to worship the Dragon Aspects to heal an Ally for 1 Stamina each.

name: Shoot
description: Shoot an Arrow that does 1d6 damage and pins the creature to the ground preventing them from moving this round of combat.
originalText: Shoot an Arrow that does 3 Damage and pins the Target to the ground preventing them from moving this round of combat.

name: Warcry
description: Release a Warcry that causes all allies and Friendly Minions to deal Double damage this round of combat.
originalText: Release a Warcry that causes all Allies and Friendly Minions to deal Double Damage this round of combat.

name: Deathflame EX
description: Hurl a ball of toxic fire that deals 6d6 damage to a creature and Poisons them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Hurl a ball of toxic fire that deals 15 Damage to a Target and Poisons them.

name: Reconstitute EX
description: Reconstruct your body and restore all of your hit points. If you are killed in Combat, you may rebuild your body after Combat and come back to life.
originalText: Reconstruct your body and restore all of your Stamina. If you are killed in Combat, you may rebuild your body after Combat and come back to life.

name: Bone Mend EX
description: Summon a whirlwind of bones that melts to restore 30 hit points to allies in an Area.
originalText: Summon a whirlwind of bones that melts to restore 30 Stamina to Allies in an Area.

name: Summon Bone Army EX
description: Raise forth 2 Ageless Thrall Minions linked to you.
originalText: Raise forth 2 Ageless Thrall Minions linked to you.

name: Ice Ray EX
description: Shoot a beam of Ice that deals 4d6 damage. If a creature is hit by a second Icy Ray or Ice Ray EX this round, this Spell also causes Freezing.
originalText: Shoot a beam of Ice that deals 10 Damage. If a Target is hit by a second Icy Ray or Ice Ray EX this round, this Spell also causes Freezing.

name: Frost Shield EX
description: Shield a creature with protective ice magic that restores 20 hit points to a creature.
originalText: Shield a Target with protective ice magic that restores 20 Stamina to a Target.

name: All Hands on Deck
description: Rally all allies to position themselves appropriately, moving all allies on the battlefield up to 25 feet each.
originalText: Rally all Allies to position themselves appropriately, moving all Allies on the Battlefield up to 5 spaces each.

name: First Mate
description: Follow in the Captain's foot steps and use any of your Masters Limited Abilities as your own.
originalText: Follow in the Captain's foot steps and use any of your Masters Limited Abilities as your own.

name: Bite
description: As an Action, the companion moves up to 15 feet and makes a melee attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 piercing damage. If the attack hits, the companion may immediately use one different companion ability as a Bonus Action.
originalText: Dart forward up to 3 spaces and deal 15 Damage by biting a Target.

name: Blood Bolt
description: Blast out a ball of Blood at every hostile creature in Range that deals 2d6 damage.
originalText: Blast out a ball of Blood at every Foe in Range that deals 5 Damage.

name: Blood Sting
description: Bite a creature leaving behind a bit of your toxins which deals 6d6 damage to a creature and Poisoning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Bite a Target leaving behind a bit of your toxins which deals 15 Damage to a Target and Poisoning them.

name: Whisper
description: As an Action, one creature within 5 feet that can hear the companion must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is charmed until the end of its next turn and must use its movement or action in a way the DM considers unhelpful to its allies.
originalText: Softly whisper into the ear of an unsuspecting Foe and Charm them.

name: Swipe
description: As an Action, the companion sweeps a 20-foot line. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 slashing damage and be pushed 5 feet in a direction chosen by the companion. On a success, they take half damage and are not pushed.
originalText: Swipe up to 4 spaces directly in front of you for 10 Damage. Targets hit may be pushed 1 space in any direction of your choosing.

name: Roar
description: As an Action, each hostile creature within 30 feet that can hear the companion must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is Frightened of the companion until the end of its next turn.
originalText: Let loose a powerful roar centered around you which forces nearby Foes to focus their attacks on you.

name: Gore
description: As an Action, the companion makes a melee attack against one creature within its reach. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 piercing damage. If the target is a lesser creature at the DM's discretion, a natural 20 may kill it outright; otherwise the hit deals an extra 2d8 piercing damage.
originalText: Spear a Foe clean through with your tusk dealing 10 Damage. High Rolls count as Critical Hits.

name: Quake
description: As an Action, choose up to eight 5-foot squares within 60 feet. Those spaces become difficult terrain for 1 minute. A creature standing in one of those spaces must make a Strength saving throw or be moved 5 feet to an adjacent space chosen by the companion.
originalText: Slam the ground causing tremors to rip the earth apart. Select up to 5 spaces and transform them into Rough Terrain spaces. If you select a space with a Target on it, deal 5 Damage and then move them one space out of the way.

name: Little Hat Trick
description: Draw a random Spell from your hat and cast it as a No-Roll Bonus Action. You must select the creature of this spell before drawing it.
