originalText: Draw a random Spell from your hat and cast it as a No-Roll Bonus Action. You must select the Target of this spell before drawing it.

name: Teleport
description: As an Action, the companion teleports up to 50 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. If a creature of similar size occupies the destination space, that creature must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or swap places with the companion.
originalText: Attempt to teleport up to 10 spaces. If the space you want to teleport to has a another Target of similar size in it, you may switch places with that Target.

name: Delusion Spray
description: Spray a hostile creature in a purple mist that deals 2d6 damage and Charming them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Spray a Foe in a purple mist that deals 5 Damage and Charming them.

name: Howl
description: As an Action, hostile creatures within 30 feet that can hear the companion must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, they have disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures other than the companion until the start of the companion's next turn.
originalText: Howl loudly in an Area centered around you causing nearby Foes to focus their attacks on you for the rest of the round.

name: Splash
description: As an Action, one creature within 10 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it has disadvantage on the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the end of its next turn.
originalText: Bounce up and down attempting to distract a Target, Stunning them.

name: Channel
description: As an Action, choose one allied creature within 30 feet. The next leveled spell or limited-use ability that ally uses before the end of its next turn does not expend its lowest required resource, at the DM's discretion.
originalText: Channel a beam of pure energy into a Target, restoring 25 Stamina. Whenever you Critical Hit with this Ability, draw a random Arcane Spell to replace this card with.

name: Dispel
description: As an Action, choose one creature within 30 feet. End one magical effect on that creature if the effect is 3rd level or lower. For stronger effects, make an ability check using the companion's proficiency bonus against DC 10 + the effect's level.
originalText: Cleanse a Target of any negative magical effects or enhancements. Whenever you Critical Hit with this Ability, draw a random Arcane Spell to replace this card with.

name: Gem Beam
description: Shoot forth a penetrating prismatic beam that deals 6d6 damage. Skilled Arcane Mages and Gemling Minions are not affected by this damage.
originalText: Shoot forth a penetrating prismatic beam that deals 15 Damages. Skilled Arcane Mages and Gemling Minions are not affected by this Damage.

name: Amplifying Crystal
description: Summon 3 giant amplifying crystals into 15 feet anywhere on the battlefield. Projectile and Beam Spells casted at one of these crystals will cause the Spell to bounce between all Amplifying Crystals on the battlefield as a Beam Spell. Your Master gains a Bonus Action after using this Ability.
originalText: Summon 3 giant amplifying crystals into 3 spaces anywhere on the Battlefield. Projectile and Beam Spells casted at one of these crystals will cause the Spell to bounce between all Amplifying Crystals on the Battlefield as a Beam Spell. Your Master gains a Bonus Action after using this Ability.

name: Holy Wave
description: Cast the Light on an ally anywhere on the battlefield to restore 30 hit points.
originalText: Cast the Light on an Ally anywhere on the Battlefield to restore 30 Stamina.

name: Healing Pulse
description: Let out a pulse of healing that heals all allies on the battlefield, restoring 15 hit points.
originalText: Let out a pulse of healing that heals all Allies on the battlefield, restoring 15 Stamina.

name: Firebolt
description: As an Action, make a ranged spell attack against a creature within 60 feet. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 fire damage. On a natural 20, each creature within 5 feet of the target takes 2d10 fire damage.
originalText: Hurl a ball of fire that deals 20 Damage at a Target. Rolling a Critical Hit, causes all Targets adjacent of the point of impact to also take Damage.

name: Firewall
description: As an Action, create a 15-foot line of magical flame in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet. The wall lasts 1 minute. A creature that enters the wall for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there takes 2d6 fire damage.
originalText: Create a Firewall in 5 connected empty spaces and transform them into Dangerous Terrain spaces.

name: Forest Prison
description: Encase a creature in vines and leaves which prisons them in a ball of nature, Stunning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Encase a Target in vines and leaves which prisons them in a ball of nature, Stunning them.

name: Hand of the Deep
description: Summons forth vines from the earth below that grasp onto the legs of hostile creatures in an Area, Stunning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Summons forth vines from the earth below that grasp onto the legs of Foes in an Area, Stunning them.

name: Shadow Blast
description: Blast a creature with a shadowy magic that deals 6d6 damage. Rolling a natural 20, causes the creature to Death Roll.
originalText: Blast a Target with a shadowy magic that deals 15 Damage. Rolling a Critical Hit, causes the Target to Death Roll.

name: Death Warp
description: Form a dark void underneath a creature that pulls them into darkness and then teleports them anywhere on the battlefield. Rolling a natural 1, causes the creature to Death Roll. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Form a dark void underneath a Target that pulls them into darkness and then teleports them anywhere on the Battlefield. Rolling a Critical Fail, causes the Target to Death Roll.

name: Magic Burst
description: Blast a creature with pure Arcane magics that deal 2d6 damage and then cast a random Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action.
originalText: Blast a Target with pure Arcane magics that deal 5 Damage and then cast a random Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Scribe Arcane
description: Craft a scroll with a simple spell and then hand it to your Master. Draw a random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory.
originalText: Craft a scroll with a simple spell and then hand it to your Master. Draw a random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory.

name: Restoring Rain
description: Summon forth a powerful rain cloud that heals in an Area restoring 25 hit points.
originalText: Summon forth a powerful rain cloud that heals in an Area restoring 25 Stamina.

name: Cleanse
description: Cleanse a creature on the battlefield of any negative magical effects or enhancements.
originalText: Cleanse a Target on the Battlefield of any negative magical effects or enhancements.

name: Throw
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Throw a creature up to 25 feet at an empty space. If you throw a creature onto a space adjacent to an ally, they may use a No-Roll Basic Attack as a Bonus Action against this creature.
originalText: Throw a Target up to 5 spaces at an empty space. If you throw a Target onto a space adjacent to an ally, they may use a No-Roll Basic Attack as a Bonus Action against this Target.

name: Crunch
description: Squeeze a creature in the jaws of your mouth dealing 6d6 damage. roll of 15 or highers cause this Ability to deal 10d6 damage.
originalText: Squeeze a Target in the jaws of your mouth dealing 15 Damage. High Rolls cause this Ability to deal 30 Damage.

name: Sonar Pulse
description: Release a wave of sound waves to image out your surroundings revealing any and all Characters in range and interrupting any Spells being casted.
originalText: Release a wave of sound waves to image out your surroundings revealing any and all Characters in range and interrupting any Spells being casted.

name: Strike
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Strike at a creature with a weapon or your fists and deal 4d6 damage. Whenever you successfully Strike a creature, adjacent Players may Basic Attack the creature as a No-Roll Bonus Action.
originalText: Strike at a Target with a weapon or your fists and deal 10 Damage. Whenever you successfully Strike a Target, adjacent Players may Basic Attack the Target as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Steal
description: Riffle through the belongings of a creature and attempt to steal an item. Draw a random Treasure Item and place it on top of this card. A Party Member may add this item to their Inventory if they move to an adjacent space during or after combat. creatures that do not carry equipment cause this Ability to Critically Fail.
originalText: Riffle through the belongings of a Target and attempt to steal an item. Draw a random Treasure Item and place it on top of this card. A Party Member may add this item to their Inventory if they move to an adjacent space during or after combat. Targets that do not carry equipment cause this Ability to Critically Fail.

name: Flap
description: Flap your arms or wings creating a massive gust of wind that knocks a creature back 25 feet. If this creature collides with a wall or another creature, they take 4d6 damage. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Flap your arms or wings creating a massive gust of wind that knocks a Target back 5 spaces. If this Target collides with a wall or another Target, they take 10 Damage.

name: Slash
description: Slash at a creature with your claws dealing 4d6 damage. Whenever Slash is used as a Bonus Action, it deals 10d6 damage.
originalText: Slash at a Target with your claws dealing 10 Damage. Whenever Slash is used as a Bonus Action, it deals 30 Damage.

name: Warped Magic
description: Attempt to cast a Spell and instead cast a random Spell of a specific element. Choose a creature on the battlefield and a Magical Element then draw a random Spell of that element and cast it at the selected creature.
originalText: Attempt to cast a Spell and instead cast a random Spell of a specific element. Choose a Target on the Battlefield and a Magical Element then draw a random Spell of that element and cast it at the selected Target.

name: Shadow Gore
description: Bleed through the shadows, teleporting you up to 15 feet and then spear a creature clean through with a shadow magic infused tusk dealing 6d6 damage.
originalText: Bleed through the shadows, teleporting you up to 3 spaces and then spear a Target clean through with a shadow magic infused tusk dealing 15 Damage.

name: Surprise Death
description: Swallow an adjacent creature whole forcing them to Death Roll. If they survive the Death Roll, spit them out onto an empty space within 15 feet. This Ability can only be used on creatures who don't notice you sneaking up on them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Swallow an adjacent Target whole forcing them to Death Roll. If they survive the Death Roll, spit them out onto an empty space within 3 spaces. This Ability can only be used on Targets who don't notice you sneaking up on them.

name: Rapid Hop
description: Engulf a creature in blue flames allowing them to move up to 50 feet when using movements and ignore all the effects of Rough Terrain until end of combat. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Engulf a Target in blue flames allowing them to move up to 10 spaces when using Move Actions and ignore all the effects of Rough Terrain until end of combat.

name: Roll Over
description: Roll around on the ground moving up to 15 feet. creatures adjacent to any of the spaces you move through may find this very adorable.
originalText: Roll around on the ground moving up to 3 spaces. Targets adjacent to any of the spaces you move through may find this very adorable.

name: Beg
description: Let out a little yelp to grab the attention of a creature and grant them a Bonus Action.
originalText: Let out a little yelp to grab the attention of a Target and grant them a Bonus Action.

name: Fire Dash
description: Dash forward in as a ball of fire, moving up to 50 feet and transforming every space you move through into hazardous terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Dash forward in as a ball of fire, moving up to 10 spaces and transforming every space you move through into Dangerous Terrain.

name: Ram
description: Ram a creature dealing 4d6 damage and knocking them back 50 feet. You may chase the creature after knocking them back moving as many spaces as you like towards the creature.
originalText: Ram a Target dealing 10 Damage and knocking them back 10 spaces. You may chase the Target after knocking them back moving as many spaces as you like towards the Target.

name: Thunder Quake
description: Leap forward high through the air moving up to 50 feet and landing in a violent fashion causing bolts of thunder to fly in all directions. creatures adjacent to where you hand take 2d6 damage.
originalText: Leap forward high through the air moving up to 10 spaces and landing in a violent fashion causing bolts of thunder to fly in all directions. Targets adjacent to where you hand take 5 Damage.

name: Double Kick
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Attack a creature with both of your legs dealing 8d6 damage and knocking them back 25 feet. You may only use this Ability on a creature who did damage to you last round.
originalText: Attack a Target with both of your legs dealing 20 Damage and knocking them back 5 spaces. You may only use this Ability on a Target who did Damage to you last round.

name: Ravage
description: Ravage the spirit of a creature by extending out wispy spirit arms from your body and swiping furiously dealing 2d6 damage for every element they are Skilled in casting.
originalText: Ravage the spirit of a Target by extending out wispy spirit arms from your body and swiping furiously dealing 5 Damage for every element they are Skilled in casting.

name: Infest
description: Jump into the body of a creature, dematerializing your spirit and merging it with theirs for a brief moment, Stunning them. natural 20s cause the creature to Death Roll. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Jump into the body of a Target, dematerializing your spirit and merging it with theirs for a brief moment, Stunning them. Critical Hits cause the Target to Death Roll.

name: Red Ichor Blast
description: Blast out a ball of Blood at every hostile creature in Range, Poisoning them. If they are already Poisoned, they take 4d6 damage instead. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Blast out a ball of Blood at every Foe in Range, Poisoning them. If they are already Poisoned, they take 10 Damage instead.

name: Image Clone
description: Morph your entire body so that you look identical to a creature. You may change the size of your tile to match your creatures.
originalText: Morph your entire body so that you look identical to a Target. You may change the size of your tile to match your Targets.

name: Shred Flesh
description: Explode the flesh, organs, and blood off your own body transforming you back into your original Ytt state. Remove any Companion cards in your Inventory that are not Ytt Companion cards. The casting of this Spell as a non-Ytt is not recommend and will cause you to Death Roll. This Spell is often called the Goodbye Spell, as it is used by some mages as a way of taking their own life.
originalText: Explode the flesh, organs, and blood off your own body transforming you back into your original Ytt state. Remove any Companion cards in your Inventory that are not Ytt Companion cards. The casting of this Spell as a non-Ytt is not recommend and will cause you to Death Roll. This Spell is often called the Goodbye Spell, as it is used by some mages as a way of taking their own life.

name: Peck
description: Jab at a creature with your beak or face smashing into them for 4d6 damage and Blinding them.
originalText: Jab at a Target with your beak or face smashing into them for 10 Damage and Blinding them.

name: Dust Cloud
description: Spin quickly in a circle causing sand, dirt, and dust to fly every and hitt all adjacent creatures, Blinding them.
originalText: Spin quickly in a circle causing sand, dirt, and dust to fly every and hitt all adjacent Targets, Blinding them.

name: Fowl Entourage
description: Quack loudly to summon 2 Scrooge Minions linked to you that just happen to arrive as you called for them. Whenever you cast a Spell, these Minions may the same Spell as No-Roll Bonus Actions.
originalText: Quack loudly to summon 2 Scrooge Minions linked to you that just happen to arrive as you called for them. Whenever you cast a Spell, these Minions may the same Spell as No-Roll Bonus Actions.

name: Ray of Frost EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Encase a creature in ice causing Freezing. Any Basic Attacks against this frozen creature will cause them to shatter and take 4d6 damage.
originalText: Encase a Target in ice causing Freezing. Any Basic Attacks against this frozen Target will cause them to shatter and take 10 Damage.

name: Tongue Lash
description: Whip out your long disgusting tongue at a creature dealing 4d6 damage and pulling them as close as possible to you. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Whip out your long disgusting tongue at a Target dealing 10 Damage and pulling them as close as possible to you.

name: Swallow
description: Swallow a creature whole forcing them to Death Roll. Low rolls with this Ability cause you to move towards the nearest ally and use it on them instead in confusion. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Swallow a Target whole forcing them to Death Roll. Low rolls with this Ability cause you to move towards the nearest Ally and use it on them instead in confusion.

name: Fungal Stomp
description: Smash an Area dealing 4d6 damage to creatures and transforming all empty spaces into Rough Terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Smash an Area dealing 10 Damage to Targets and transforming all empty spaces into Rough Terrain.

name: Fungal Shield
description: Encase an ally with a layer of enchanted mold that prevents all damage and Death Rolls for the rest of the round. You may only use Fungal Shield once on each ally per game.
originalText: Encase an Ally with a layer of enchanted mold that prevents all Damage and Death Rolls for the rest of the round. You may only use Fungal Shield once on each Ally per game.

name: Snap
description: Quickly snap at a creature dealing damage equal to your roll. natural 20s with this Ability cause Death Rolls.
originalText: Quickly snap at a Target dealing Damage equal to your roll. Critical Hits with this Ability cause Death Rolls.

name: Polish
description: Coat a creature in a Polish that causes their roll of 15 or highers to become natural 20s for the rest of the round. natural 20s with this Spell cause your creature's next Action to natural 20.
originalText: Coat a Target in a Polish that causes their High Rolls to become Critical Hits for the rest of the round. Critical Hits with this Spell cause your Target's next Action to Critical Hit.

name: Vine Lash
description: Grab a creature anywhere on the battlefield with your vines as they tunnel up beneath them and deal 10d6 damage, Poisoning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Grab a Target anywhere on the Battlefield with your vines as they tunnel up beneath them and deal 25 Damage, Poisoning them.

name: Deep Tunnel
description: Quickly dig underground and reappear anywhere on the battlefield, transforming all adjacent spaces into Rough Terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Quickly dig underground and reappear anywhere on the Battlefield, transforming all adjacent spaces into Rough Terrain.

name: Grand Pollination
description: Release your spores violently dealing 4d6 damage to all adjacent creatures and spawning 6 Minions linked to you anywhere on the battlefield. If you are put in Danger, all Minions linked to you are destroyed.
originalText: Release your spores violently dealing 10 Damage to all adjacent Targets and spawning 6 Minions linked to you anywhere on the Battlefield. If you are put in Danger, all Minions linked to you are destroyed.

name: Skullbash
description: Lower your head and take aim at a creature. Whenever the creature next tries to use an Action, you may interrupt that Action by charging at them dealing 4d6 damage .
originalText: Lower your head and take aim at a Target. Whenever the Target next tries to use an Action, you may interrupt that Action by charging at them dealing 10 Damage .

name: Giant Growth
description: Surround a creature in a mist that dramatically increases their size transforming them into a Large Tile until end of combat.
originalText: Surround a Target in a mist that dramatically increases their size transforming them into a Large Tile until end of combat.

name: Skydive
description: Swoop down quickly at creature biting them for 2d6 damage and then move to any space on the battlefield. The damage Skydive deals is increased by 10 at the end of every round of combat.
originalText: Swoop down quickly at Target biting them for 5 Damage and then move to any space on the Battlefield. The Damage Skydive deals is increased by 10 at the end of every round of combat.

name: Hunter Seeker Beam
description: Release a barrage of arcane energy from your eyes that deal 2d6 damage to all creatures on the battlefield or select up to 25 feet to transform into Rough Terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Release a barrage of arcane energy from your eyes that deal 5 Damage to all Targets on the Battlefield or select up to 5 spaces to transform into Rough Terrain.

name: Venomnate
description: Spew a toxic poison onto a creature that deals 2d6 damage and Poisoning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Spew a toxic poison onto a Target that deals 5 Damage and Poisoning them.

name: Terra Ooze
description: Expel a bright color ooze from your body and transform the space or spaces you are currently standing on into Rough Terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Expel a bright color ooze from your body and transform the space or spaces you are currently standing on into Rough Terrain.

name: Honorfang
description: Bite a creature with your fangs causing both of your inner spirits to battle to the death. Both you and the creature Roll and whoever rolls lowest is forced to Death Roll.
originalText: Bite a Target with your fangs causing both of your inner spirits to battle to the death. Both you and the Target Roll and whoever rolls lowest is forced to Death Roll.

name: Magic Paw
description: Swipe at a creature with two conjured magical paws that deals 6d6 damage. This Ability does 12d6 damage against Beasts.
originalText: Swipe at a Target with two conjured magical paws that deals 15 Damage. This Ability does 35 Damage against Beasts.

name: Bubble
description: Shell a creature in a watery bubble that prevents them taking damage and using Actions for the rest of the round.
originalText: Shell a Target in a watery bubble that prevents them taking Damage and using Actions for the rest of the round.

name: Oink
description: Let out a fierce Oink that does absolutely nothing. This is a very basic Spell well known by farmers and butchers.
originalText: Let out a fierce Oink that does absolutely nothing. This is a very basic Spell well known by farmers and butchers.

name: Arcing Fire
description: Release a breath of fire that deal 6d6 damage in a Line that then arcs up to 90 degrees in a direction of your choice to hit additional creatures.
originalText: Release a breath of fire that deal 15 Damage in a Line that then arcs up to 90 degrees in a direction of your choice to hit additional Targets.

name: Flame Tether
description: Attach a fiery tether to all creatures in an Area around you which causes them to suffer the damage of the next Ability they use as well.
originalText: Attach a fiery tether to all Targets in an Area around you which causes them to suffer the Damage of the next Ability they use as well.

name: Poison Breath
description: Breath out a corrosive poison that deals 6d6 damage to a creature, Poisoning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Breath out a corrosive poison that deals 15 Damage to a Target, Poisoning them.

name: Eggtomb
description: Grab a creature and entomb them inside an Egg. If this creature is not freed before the end of the next round, they must Death Roll.
originalText: Grab a Target and entomb them inside an Egg. If this Target is not freed before the end of the next round, they must Death Roll.

name: Magma Orb
description: Spew a orb made out of molten lava at a creature that deals 2d6 damage and transforms all empty spaces adjacent to the creature into hazardous terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Spew a orb made out of molten lava at a Target that deals 5 Damage and transforms all empty spaces adjacent to the Target into Dangerous Terrain.

name: Combustion Wave
description: Smash your tail into the ground and warp the battlefield by transforming all Rough and Walled Terrain into hazardous terrain. If you do not have a tail, this Spell causes you to soil yourself with liquid magma forcing you to Death Roll. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Smash your tail into the ground and warp the Battlefield by transforming all Rough and Walled Terrain into Dangerous Terrain. If you do not have a tail, this Spell causes you to soil yourself with liquid magma forcing you to Death Roll.

name: Puncture
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Pierce through a creature's defenses and deal 4d6 damage leaving them defenseless. If successful, your Master may Basic Attack as a No-Roll Bonus Action.
originalText: Pierce through a Target's defenses and deal 10 Damage leaving them defenseless. If successful, your Master may Basic Attack as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Featherguard
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Defend yourself and your allies by forming a shield made out of magical feathers. allies in an Area centered on you are immune non-Magic attacks and Abilities for the rest of the round.
originalText: Defend yourself and your Allies by forming a shield made out of magical feathers. Allies in an Area centered on you are immune non-Magic attacks and Abilities for the rest of the round.

name: Death Web
description: Spew a black and sticky substance that transforms an Area into hazardous terrain. The knowledge of this Spell makes you immune to the effects of hazardous terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Spew a black and sticky substance that transforms an Area into Dangerous Terrain. The knowledge of this Spell makes you immune to the effects of Dangerous Terrain.

name: Culling Swing
description: Swing your weapon in an efficiently violent fashion that deals 10d6 damage to all adjacent creatures.
originalText: Swing your weapon in an efficiently violent fashion that deals 30 Damage to all adjacent Targets.

name: Flesh Bomb
description: Throw a magical bomb made up of the flesh of different creatures and people infused with Dark essence that explodes dealing 4d6 damage in an Area.
originalText: Throw a magical bomb made up of the flesh of different creatures and people infused with Dark essence that explodes dealing 10 Damage in an Area.

name: Blood Magic Circle
description: Pull out a jar filled with blood and sprinkle it in a circle around you transforming all spaces in an Area centered around you into Rough Terrain. Whenever a Character casts a Spell while standing on one of these spaces, they roll with a six sided die. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Pull out a jar filled with blood and sprinkle it in a circle around you transforming all spaces in an Area centered around you into Rough Terrain. Whenever a Character casts a Spell while standing on one of these spaces, they roll with a six sided die.

name: Slap
description: As an Action, the companion makes a melee attack with advantage. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage. Tiny or smaller targets are automatically hit unless the DM rules otherwise.
originalText: Surprise attack a Target with a slap out of nowhere that does 10 Damage. Average Rolls or higher with this Ability allow you to use it again on the same Target as a Bonus Action.

name: Razorstrike
description: Strike a creature with the razor's edge of your claw or weapon dealing 4d6 damage. Defeating a creature or natural 20s with this Ability cause the creature to Death Roll twice.
originalText: Strike a Target with the razor's edge of your claw or weapon dealing 10 Damage. Defeating a Target or Critical Hits with this Ability cause the Target to Death Roll twice.

name: Touch of Kallisto
description: A blessing bestowed on you allows to fight almost endlessly by restoring one of your Reactions and fully restoring your hit points.
originalText: A blessing bestowed on you allows to fight almost endlessly by restoring one of your Anytime Actions and fully restoring your Stamina.

name: Shield Stance EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Prepare yourself from an incoming assault. For the rest of this round, whenever a hostile creature attacks you, counterattack them dealing 4d6 damage.
originalText: Prepare yourself from an incoming assault. For the rest of this round, whenever a Foe attacks you, counterattack them dealing 10 Damage.

name: Blockade EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Raise up a weapon or shield to Block all incoming attacks and projectiles. For the rest of the round, reduce all damage taken to 1.
originalText: Raise up a weapon or shield to Block all incoming attacks and projectiles. For the rest of the round, reduce all damage taken to 1.

name: Whirlwind EX
description: Throw yourself into a whirlwind hitting all adjacent creatures dealing 4d6 damage. You may move up to 15 feet before using this Ability.
originalText: Throw yourself into a whirlwind hitting all adjacent Targets dealing 10 Damage. You may move up to 3 spaces before using this Ability.

name: Tosser EX
description: Lift an adjacent creature and throw them up to 25 feet at creature space. hostile creatures will take 4d6 damage if thrown or hit by a creature who was thrown.
originalText: Lift an adjacent Target and throw them up to 5 spaces at Target space. Foes will take 10 damage if thrown or hit by a Target who was thrown.

name: Taunting Blow EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Attack a creature dealing 4d6 damage. If successful, the creature must only Basic Attack and use Abilities directed at you this round.
originalText: Attack a Target dealing 10 Damage. If successful, the Target must only Basic Attack and use Abilities directed at you this round.

name: Second Wind EX
description: Focus your mind and body to grant yourself a massive dose of adrenaline and fight through the pain. Restore all of your hit points.
originalText: Focus your mind and body to grant yourself a massive dose of adrenaline and fight through the pain. Restore all of your Stamina.

name: Purify EX
description: Radiate forward a wave of bright fire that deals 4d6 damage to hostile creatures. Skilled Dark Mages take 8d6 damage instead.
originalText: Radiate forward a wave of bright fire that deals 10 Damage to Foes. Skilled Dark Mages take 20 Damage instead.

name: Honor Chains EX
description: Chain up to two creatures together or to the ground by binding them with holy light, Stunning and Burning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Chain up to two Targets together or to the ground by binding them with holy light, Stunning and Burning them.

name: Righteous Fury EX
description: Swing your Warhammer in a forward arc dealing 4d6 damage to up to 3 creatures. Skilled Dark Mages take 8d6 damage instead.
originalText: Swing your Warhammer in a forward arc dealing 10 Damage to up to 3 Targets. Skilled Dark Mages take 20 Damage instead.

name: Hammer of Sanctification EX
description: Call down a giant flaming Hammer that erupts into a wave of fire all over the battlefield that deals 2d6 damage.
originalText: Call down a giant flaming Hammer that erupts into a wave of fire all over the Battlefield that deals 5 Damage.

name: Lay on Hands EX
description: Release a wave of light onto a creature that restores all of their hit points. Skilled Dark Mages take damage 12d6 damage.
originalText: Release a wave of light onto a Target that restores all of their Stamina. Skilled Dark Mages take Damage 40 Damage.

name: Blessing of Strength
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Bless each Player with a powerful blessing that strengthens them to deal Double damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat. natural 1ures still bless other Players regardless of the punishment from the failure.
originalText: Bless each Player with a powerful blessing that strengthens them to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat. Critical Failures still bless other Players regardless of the punishment from the failure.

name: Force Punch EX
description: Punch through the air sending a gust of wind at a creature that deals 6d6 damage and knocks them back 25 feet.
originalText: Punch through the air sending a gust of wind at a Target that deals 15 Damage and knocks them back 5 spaces.

name: Blink EX
description: Teleport to creature empty space instantly.
originalText: Teleport to Target empty space instantly.

name: Rolling Fog EX
description: Create a dense fog in 4 connected empty spaces and transform them into Rough Terrain. Skilled Earth Mages are not affected by these spaces. If ignited by a Fire Spell, all connected fog spaces will explode dealing 2d6 damage to any creature inside or adjacent to these spaces. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Create a dense fog in 4 connected empty spaces and transform them into Rough Terrain. Skilled Earth Mages are not affected by these spaces. If ignited by a Fire Spell, all connected fog spaces will explode dealing 5 Damage to any Target inside or adjacent to these spaces.

name: Flare EX
description: Summon a powerful ball of light in your hands that can be thrown for 6d6 damage to a single creature or split into three separate balls that each deal 2d6 damage to three different creatures. creatures hit by flare are Blinded.
originalText: Summon a powerful ball of light in your hands that can be thrown for 15 Damage to a single Target or split into three separate balls that each deal 5 damage to three different Targets. Targets hit by flare are Blinded.

name: Enlarge EX
description: Dramatically change the size of a creature or their weapon until end of combat. This Spells transforms the creature into a Large Tile until end of combat. If used on a Weapon, the creature gains the benefits of being a Large Tile without transforming into one.
originalText: Dramatically change the size of a Target or their weapon until end of combat. This Spells transforms the Target into a Large Tile until end of combat. If used on a Weapon, the Target gains the benefits of being a Large Tile without transforming into one.

name: Frost Cut EX
description: Turn your Fist or Weapon into a shard of ice and stab a creature for 4d6 damage. roll of 15 or highers cause Freezing.
originalText: Turn your Fist or Weapon into a shard of ice and stab a Target for 10 Damage. High Rolls cause Freezing.

name: Mana Shield EX
description: Conjure a barrier of magic around a creature blocking the next source of damage they take this round.
originalText: Conjure a barrier of magic around a Target blocking the next source of Damage they take this round.

name: Iceblast EX
description: Blast a creature with a burst of Frost that deals 6d6 damage and Freezing them. natural 20s allow you to cast this Spell again as a No-Roll Bonus Action.
originalText: Blast a Target with a burst of Frost that deals 15 Damage and Freezing them. Critical Hits allow you to cast this Spell again as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Blizzard EX
description: Summon forth a stormcloud that pelts the ground with shards of ice that deal 6d6 damage to all hostile creatures in an Area. natural 20s will cause this Spell to hit all hostile creatures on the battlefield instead of being cast in an Area.
originalText: Summon forth a stormcloud that pelts the ground with shards of ice that deal 15 Damage to all Foes in an Area. Critical Hits will cause this Spell to hit all Foes on the Battlefield instead of being cast in an Area.

name: Fireball EX
description: Throw a ball of fire dealing 8d6 damage at a creature. natural 20s cause this Spell to transform into Pyroblast instead.
originalText: Throw a ball of fire dealing 20 Damage at a Target. Critical Hits cause this Spell to transform into Pyroblast instead.

name: Flamelance EX
description: Throw a fire spear that deals 6d6 damage. Rolling a natural 20 causes Burning.
originalText: Throw a fire spear that deals 15 Damage. Rolling a Critical Hit causes Burning.

name: Arcane Missiles EX
description: Shoot a barrage of 5 missiles that each deal 2d6 damage at up to 5 creatures. natural 20 doubles both the number of missiles fired and damage dealt.
originalText: Shoot a barrage of 5 missiles that each deal 5 Damage at up to 5 Targets. Critical Hit doubles both the number of missiles fired and damage dealt.

name: Arcane Beam EX
description: Shoot a beam of pure arcane energy that can pierce through almost any terrain and deals 4d6 damage. natural 20s grant you a No-Roll Bonus Action to cast this Spell a second time. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Shoot a beam of pure arcane energy that can pierce through almost any terrain and deals 10 Damage. Critical Hits grant you a No-Roll Bonus Action to cast this Spell a second time.

name: Force Pillar EX
description: Using your inner spirit, bend the earth in an Area to summon a pillar out of the ground, walls, or ceiling transforming up to 20 feet into Walled Terrain. creatures in these spaces take 2d6 damage and are pushed away. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Using your inner spirit, bend the earth in an Area to summon a pillar out of the ground, walls, or ceiling transforming up to 4 spaces into Walled Terrain. Targets in these spaces take 5 Damage and are pushed away.

name: Wind Walk EX
description: Transform into a nimbus and travel at great speeds to move up to 25 feet. Each space you move through transforms them into Rough Terrain spaces. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Transform into a nimbus and travel at great speeds to move up to 5 spaces. Each space you move through transforms them into Rough Terrain spaces.

name: Divine Mending EX
description: Channel the power of the light through a creature anywhere on the battlefield restoring 25 hit points.
originalText: Channel the power of the light through a Target anywhere on the Battlefield restoring 25 Stamina.

name: Surefire Melody EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Play a quick tune on your favorite instrument to empower an ally for this round. The ally who hears this tune is sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they Critically Fail.
originalText: Play a quick tune on your favorite instrument to empower an Ally for this round. The Ally who hears this tune is sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they Critically Fail.

name: Disguise EX
description: Change the voice you use for your Character to disguise yourself. You may take on the shape of any creature or race until you stop doing the voice, in which case the magic of this Spell breaks and you are transformed back to normal.
originalText: Change the voice you use for your Character to disguise yourself. You may take on the shape of any creature or race until you stop doing the voice, in which case the magic of this Spell breaks and you are transformed back to normal.

name: Charm EX
description: Attempt to Charm a creature with your allures, Charming Them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Attempt to Charm a Target with your allures, Charming Them.

name: Lullaby EX
description: Sing a soft song that to a hostile creatures which puts them to sleep which causes Freezing.
originalText: Sing a soft song that to a Foes which puts them to sleep which causes Freezing.

name: Distracting Shout EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Scream at a creature startling them forcing them to redirect all of their Attacks and Abilities on to you for the rest of the round.
originalText: Scream at a Target startling them forcing them to redirect all of their Attacks and Abilities on to you for the rest of the round.

name: Shadow Ice EX
description: Throw a shard of black ice that deals 6d6 damage. If the creature is on Rough or hazardous terrain, deal 10d6 damage instead. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Throw a shard of black ice that deals 15 damage. If the Target is on Rough or Dangerous Terrain, deal 25 Damage instead.

name: Blanket of Darkness EX
description: Create a blanket of darkness in an Area transforming all spaces inside it into Rough Terrain. Whenever a creature finishes using an Action inside this Area, they become Charmed. The blanket may be destroyed at any time by any Skilled Dark Mage causing all creatures inside to take 10d6 damage in the resulting implosion. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Create a blanket of darkness in an Area transforming all spaces inside it into Rough Terrain. Whenever a Target finishes using an Action inside this Area, they become Charmed. The blanket may be destroyed at any time by any Skilled Dark Mage causing all Targets inside to take 30 Damage in the resulting implosion.

name: Life Drain EX
description: Drain the life out of a creature dealing 4d6 damage and restores hit points equal to the amount of damage dealt. Your creature must be a Living being in order to restore hit points.
originalText: Drain the life out of a Target dealing 10 Damage and restores Stamina equal to the amount of damage dealt. Your Target must be a Living being in order to restore Stamina.

name: Pestilence EX
description: Release a cloud of disease in an Area transforming all spaces inside it into Rough Terrain. At the start of every round, Poison all creatures inside this cloud. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Release a cloud of disease in an Area transforming all spaces inside it into Rough Terrain. At the start of every round, Poison all Targets inside this cloud.

name: Nearsight EX
description: Conjure a black sludge directly into the face of a creature, Blinding them.
originalText: Conjure a black sludge directly into the face of a Target, Blinding them.

name: Essence Tap EX
description: Drain your hit points by 15 to fully restore an allies hit points.
originalText: Drain your Stamina by 15 to fully restore an Allies Stamina.

name: Grand Raven's Claw EX
description: Conjure forth a hand of shadow that swipes an Area dealing 4d6 damage. You may also use the Claw to grab a hold of a single creature instead of an Area, which causes the creature to take an additional 2d6 damage and Burning them.
originalText: Conjure forth a hand of shadow that swipes an Area dealing 10 damage. You may also use the Claw to grab a hold of a single Target instead of an Area, which causes the Target to take an additional 5 Damage and Burning them.

name: Darkfire EX
description: Drain some of your lifeforce dealing 10d6 damage by causing a massive wave of black flames. After casting this Spell, drain 25 hit points.
originalText: Drain some of your lifeforce dealing 25 Damage by causing a massive wave of black flames. After casting this Spell, drain 25 Stamina.

name: Soul Steal EX
description: Drain a part of a creatures soul dealing 2d6 damage then restoring all of your hit points and summoning an Ageless Thrall Minion linked to you in an adjacent space.
originalText: Drain a part of a Targets soul dealing 5 Damage then restoring all of your Stamina and summoning an Ageless Thrall Minion linked to you in an adjacent space.

name: Chaos Flame EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Engulf creatures in an Area in magical Fire empowering their Basic Attacks to deal Double damage.
originalText: Engulf Targets in an Area in magical Fire empowering their Basic Attacks to deal Double Damage.

name: Bone Soul Shield EX
description: Shield an ally in a Bone Soul Shield that blocks the next source of damage they take this round.
originalText: Shield an Ally in a Bone Soul Shield that blocks the next source of Damage they take this round.

name: Avalanche EX
description: Leap up high into the air and moving up to 15 feet and then slam down on a creature for 6d6 damage.
originalText: Leap up high into the air and moving up to 3 spaces and then slam down on a Target for 15 Damage.

name: Seismic Slam EX
description: Suplex a creature over your head moving them to the space behind you and dealing 10d6 damage to you and the creature.
originalText: Suplex a Target over your head moving them to the space behind you and dealing 25 Damage to you and the Target.

name: Cleave EX
description: Swing in a circle hitting adjacent creatures for 4d6 damage.
originalText: Swing in a circle hitting adjacent Targets for 10 Damage.

name: Bearserk EX
description: Release a mighty bellowing roar and transform into your Vendo form, a mix of your current Race and a Highbear. While in this form, you become a Large Tile.
originalText: Release a mighty bellowing roar and transform into your Vendo form, a mix of your current Race and a Highbear. While in this form, you become a Large Tile.

name: Double Frost EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Slash crossing down on a creature dealing 8d6 damage. This attack can only miss on natural 1ures.
originalText: Slash crossing down on a Target dealing 20 Damage. This attack can only miss on Critical Failures.

name: Purge EX
description: Purge all illnesses out of your body cleansing you of all negative effects and restoring all of your hit points.
originalText: Purge all illnesses out of your body cleansing you of all negative effects and restoring all of your Stamina.

name: Summon Air Sprites EX
description: Summon up to 3 air spirits as Minions linked to you.
originalText: Summon up to 3 air spirits as Minions linked to you.

name: Rage Totem EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Conjure a Fire totem in an empty space that empowers all allies on the battlefield causing them to deal Double damage with Basic Attacks. This Fire totem can be easily destroyed by hostile creatures clever enough to understand its power.
originalText: Conjure a Fire totem in an empty space that empowers all Allies on the Battlefield causing them to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks. This Fire totem can be easily destroyed by Foes clever enough to understand its power.

name: Call Earthlord EX
description: Call forth an earthlord Minion linked to you. Earthlord Minions are near impossible to destroy in combat. High rolls cause you to summon 2 Earthlords.
originalText: Call forth an earthlord Minion linked to you. Earthlord Minions are near impossible to destroy in combat. High rolls cause you to summon 2 Earthlords.

name: Wind Blast EX
description: Launch forth an icy wind at creatures dealing 8d6 damage and Freezing them. creatures hit are then also knock back 50 feet.
originalText: Launch forth an icy wind at Targets dealing 20 Damage and Freezing them. Targets hit are then also knock back 10 spaces.

name: Frost Blast EX
description: Release a shard of ice from your hands that deals 6d6 damage.
originalText: Release a shard of ice from your hands that deals 15 Damage.

name: Wall of Ice EX
description: Summon forth a wall that transforms 4 connected spaces into Walled Terrain. This wall is made of solid ice and would be very hard to break through. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Summon forth a wall that transforms 4 connected spaces into Walled Terrain. This wall is made of solid ice and would be very hard to break through.

name: Aqua Blast
description: Summon a ball of water and launch it forward at high speeds dealing 6d6 damage to creatures.
originalText: Summon a ball of water and launch it forward at high speeds dealing 15 Damage to Targets.

name: Way of the Tiger EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Empower a creature with your inner spirit causing all of you to deal Double damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat. natural 20s cause you all to deal Triple damage with Basic Attacks.
originalText: Empower a Target with your inner spirit causing all of you to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat. Critical Hits cause you all to deal Triple Damage with Basic Attacks.

name: Soothe Spirits EX
description: Attempts to soothe the inner spirit of a creature, reducing hatred, aggression, fear, or an emotion of your choice. Some hostile creatures can be removed from combat or even made to join your Party as a Companion from the effects of this Spell. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Attempts to soothe the inner spirit of a Target, reducing hatred, aggression, fear, or an emotion of your choice. Some Foes can be removed from combat or even made to join your Party as a Companion from the effects of this Spell.

name: Serpent Sting EX
description: Strike a creature twice with a pinched fist causing 6d6 damage to a creature and Poisoning them. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Strike a Target twice with a pinched fist causing 15 Damage to a Target and Poisoning them.

name: Mana Burst EX
description: Blast a creature with arcane mana dealing 8d6 damage. If successful, you may then move the creature up to 25 feet.
originalText: Blast a Target with arcane mana dealing 20 Damage. If successful, you may then move the Target up to 5 spaces.

name: Burn Agility EX
description: Sear a creature with an Arcane curse that causes every space they move, or are moved, for the rest of this round to burn them from this curse with an electric shock that deals 2d6 damage and Burning them.
originalText: Sear a Target with an Arcane curse that causes every space they move, or are moved, for the rest of this round to burn them from this curse with an electric shock that deals 5 Damage and Burning them.

name: Twilight Ray EX
description: Envelope the entire battlefield with a wave of shadowy mana dealing 4d6 damage to all hostile creatures.
originalText: Envelope the entire Battlefield with a wave of shadowy mana dealing 10 Damage to all Foes.

name: Lascene EX
description: The entire realm becomes frozen in time for a few brief moments. All creatures on the battlefield become puppets you control with your psychic strings. You may move as many creatures as you like up to 15 feet and then unfreeze time. A Believer who casts this Spell is stuck locked in limbo as they are lost in time and thus, is effectively killed. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: The entire realm becomes frozen in time for a few brief moments. All Targets on the Battlefield become puppets you control with your psychic strings. You may move as many Targets as you like up to 3 spaces and then unfreeze time. A Believer who casts this Spell is stuck locked in limbo as they are lost in time and thus, is effectively killed.

name: Shadow Puppet EX
description: Conjure a shadowy entity that deals 4d6 damage to a creature and Silencing them.
originalText: Conjure a shadowy entity that deals 10 Damage to a Target and Silencing them.

name: Shadowstep EX
description: Twist the shadows to move a creature up to 50 feet and Silencing them.
originalText: Twist the shadows to move a Target up to 10 spaces and Silencing them.

name: Sunstrike EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Enchant your weapon with the power of the light and swiftly attack a creature dealing 6d6 damage. Restore 10 hit points to any ally who attacks this creature until the end of the round.
originalText: Enchant your weapon with the power of the light and swiftly attack a Target dealing 15 Damage. Restore 10 Stamina to any Ally who attacks this Target until the end of the round.

name: Solar Flare EX
description: Release a blast of light that hits all adjacent creatures, Blinding them. When solar flare is casted in dark rooms, little balls of lights remain all over the battlefield lighting up the darkness for a few moments.
originalText: Release a blast of light that hits all adjacent Targets, Blinding them. When solar flare is casted in dark rooms, little balls of lights remain all over the Battlefield lighting up the darkness for a few moments.

name: Sunbolt EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Release a bolt of sun energy at a creature that deals 6d6 damage. Restore 10 hit points to any ally who attacks these creatures this round.
originalText: Release a bolt of sun energy at a Target that deals 15 damage. Restore 10 Stamina to any Ally who attacks these Targets this round.

name: Sunrise EX
description: Create a Sunrune on an empty space anywhere on the battlefield, transforming this space into Rough Terrain. Whenever an ally moves onto Sunrune space, they may activate it which consumes the Sunrune to grant them a Bonus Action. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Create a Sunrune on an empty space anywhere on the Battlefield, transforming this space into Rough Terrain. Whenever an Ally moves onto Sunrune space, they may activate it which consumes the Sunrune to grant them a Bonus Action.

name: Holy Light EX
description: Cast the Light on an ally splashing them with a wave of holy magic which restores 40 hit points. roll of 15 or highers allow you to cast this Spell again as a No-Roll Bonus Action on a different ally.
originalText: Cast the Light on an Ally splashing them with a wave of holy magic which restores 40 Stamina. High Rolls allow you to cast this Spell again as a No-Roll Bonus Action on a different Ally.

name: Aurora Borealis EX
description: A wave of colorful lights flies over the battlefield shooting down 10 bolts of pure sun energy at creatures of your choice. These each bolts restore 5 hit points to allies and deal 1d4 damage to hostile creatures.
originalText: A wave of colorful lights flies over the battlefield shooting down 10 bolts of pure sun energy at Targets of your choice. These each bolts restore 5 Stamina to Allies and deal 1 Damage to Foes.

name: Magnetic Crush EX
description: Throw up to two weapons at 2 different hostile creatures that deal 4d6 damage. These weapons are then returned to you after being thrown. You need 2 Weapons to use this Ability.
originalText: Throw up to two weapons at 2 different Foes that deal 10 Damage. These weapons are then returned to you after being thrown. You need 2 Weapons to use this Ability.

name: Draggin Lightning EX
description: Throw out an electrical tether that pulls a creature in range as close as possible to you. If they are a hostile creature, shock them for 4d6 damage. If they are an ally, restore 20 hit points. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Throw out an electrical tether that pulls a Target in range as close as possible to you. If they are a Foe, shock them for 10 Damage. If they are an Ally, restore 20 Stamina.

name: Lightning Strike EX
description: Release a bolt of Lightning from your weapons that deals 4d6 damage to a creature. If successful, the bolt of lightning will bounce to another hostile creature within 15 feet and continue bouncing as long as you have new creatures.
originalText: Release a bolt of Lightning from your weapons that deals 10 Damage to a Target. If successful, the bolt of lightning will bounce to another Foe within 3 spaces and continue bouncing as long as you have new Targets.

name: Flash EX
description: In the blink of an eye, move up to 50 feet almost instantly as you travel through creatures along the way. Any creature you pass through takes 1d4 damage.
originalText: In the blink of an eye, move up to 10 Spaces almost instantly as you travel through Targets along the way. Any Target you pass through takes 1 Damage.

name: Thunderclap EX
description: Slam down onto the ground causing a shockwave that deals 4d6 damage to all adjacent hostile creatures.
originalText: Slam down onto the ground causing a shockwave that deals 10 Damage to all adjacent Foes.

name: Thunderous Roar EX
description: Let out a Thunderous Roar striking all hostile creatures on the battlefield with a bolt of lightning that deals 2d6 damage and restore hit points equal to the total damage dealt.
originalText: Let out a Thunderous Roar striking all Foes on the Battlefield with a bolt of lightning that deals 5 Damage and restore Stamina equal to the total Damage dealt.

name: Call Mjollnir EX
description: Request the aid of the Siffiran, summoning a giant astral hammer from the sky above that slams down dealing 6d6 damage in an Area.
originalText: Request the aid of the Siffiran, summoning a giant astral hammer from the sky above that slams down dealing 15 Damage in an Area.

name: Thunderdome EX
description: Create a sphere of pure lightning that pushes all hostile creatures back as it expands outwards of you. allies may move and attack freely through the Thunderdome, but hostile creatures cannot enter and have their Basic Attacks and Abilities blocked by the sphere until it has absorbed 12d6 damage. You may only have 1 Thunderdome activated at anytime. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Create a sphere of pure lightning that pushes all Foes back as it expands outwards of you. Allies may move and attack freely through the Thunderdome, but Foes cannot enter and have their Basic Attacks and Abilities blocked by the sphere until it has absorbed 100 Damage. You may only have 1 Thunderdome activated at anytime.

name: Regal Top Hat EX
description: Pull a spell out of your Hat and cast it at a creature. Draw a random Spell and cast it as a No-Roll Bonus Action. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Pull a spell out of your Hat and cast it at a Target. Draw a random Spell and cast it as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Encore EX
description: Recast the last Spell pulled from your Regal Top Hat. You may not recast Consumable, Anytime or Limited Abilities. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Recast the last Spell pulled from your Regal Top Hat. You may not recast Consumable, Anytime or Limited Abilities.

name: Levitate EX
description: Levitate up to 5 creatures on the battlefield. Each creature may be moved up to 15 feet.
originalText: Levitate up to 5 Targets on the Battlefield. Each Target may be moved up to 3 spaces.

name: Flock of Ravens EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Transform yourself into a flock of up to 3 ravens and place them in empty adjacent spaces. Each raven can only take a single attack before they are killed. At the start of the round, you may transform back into yourself and dispel all other ravens. If all ravens are killed, you are put in Danger.
originalText: Transform yourself into a flock of up to 3 ravens and place them in empty adjacent spaces. Each raven can only take a single attack before they are killed. At the start of the round, you may transform back into yourself and dispel all other ravens. If all ravens are killed, you are put in Danger.

name: Copy Cat EX
description: Perform a Ability used by an ally this round. You may not use Consumable or Limited Abilities.
originalText: Perform a Ability used by an Ally this round. You may not use Consumable or Limited Abilities.

name: Disappear EX
description: Cast a distraction and in the blink of an eye make a creature disappear which Stuns by causing them to vanish from the battlefield for the rest of the round. The creature reappears once they they are no longer Stunned. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Cast a distraction and in the blink of an eye make a Target disappear which Stuns by causing them to vanish from the Battlefield for the rest of the round. The Target reappears once they they are no longer Stunned.

name: Card Trick EX
description: Pull out a Deck of Cards and empower the Spells of your team. For the rest of the round, whenever you or an ally casts a Spell, they may draw a random Spell and then choose to cast that Spell instead. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Pull out a Deck of Cards and empower the Spells of your team. For the rest of the round, whenever you or an Ally casts a Spell, they may draw a random Spell and then choose to cast that Spell instead.

name: Round of Applause EX
description: Enchant a creature's mind causing them to believe they are being praised by the divine themselves and forced to bend to their will, Charming them. You may suggest what the creature should do on their turn. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Enchant a Target's mind causing them to believe they are being praised by the divine themselves and forced to bend to their will, Charming them. You may suggest what the Target should do on their turn.

name: Polymorph EX
description: Transform a creature into a random Beast Companion until end of combat. creatures may roll at the start of combat to attempt to break this transformation with a roll of 15 or higher as if it were a status effect.
originalText: Transform a Target into a random Beast Companion until end of combat. Targets may roll at the start of combat to attempt to break this transformation with a High Roll as if it were a status effect.

name: Featherfye EX
description: Bewitch a creature reducing their weight to that of a feather. The creature will be able to float around the battlefield and is Immune to Rough and hazardous terrain, but is very vulnerable to knockback abilities. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Bewitch a Target reducing their weight to that of a feather. The Target will be able to float around the Battlefield and is Immune to Rough and Dangerous Terrain, but is very vulnerable to knockback abilities.

name: Dreambolt EX
description: Blast a target with a shadowy blue mist that deals 4d6 damage. You and your allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.
originalText: Blast a target with a shadowy blue mist that deals 10 Damage. You and your Allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.

name: Hallucination EX
description: Create a Hallucination of any creature on the battlefield as a Minion linked to you and place it in empty adjacent space. You and your allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the number of Hallucinations summoned by 2 per Action spent.
originalText: Create a Hallucination of any Target on the Battlefield as a Minion linked to you and place it in empty adjacent space. You and your Allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the number of Hallucinations summoned by 2 per Action spent.

name: Dreamwalk EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Walk through the dream world and teleport to creature empty space attacking an adjacent creature for 6d6 damage. You and your allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.
originalText: Walk through the dream world and teleport to Target empty space attacking an adjacent Target for 15 Damage. You and your Allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.

name: Sleep EX
description: Place your hand against a creature and force them to sleep, Stunning them. Casting this Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Actions causes it to backfire and Stun you. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Place your hand against a Target and force them to sleep, Stunning them. Casting this Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Actions causes it to backfire and Stun you.

name: Terrorize Mind EX
description: Terrorize a creature dealing 4d6 damage and Silencing them. You and your allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.
originalText: Terrorize a Target dealing 10 Damage and Silencing them. You and your Allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.

name: Nightmare EX
description: Force a Nightmare onto a creature, Charming them. You and your allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime boost the number of creatures this Spell will hit by 1 per Action spent. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Force a Nightmare onto a Target, Charming them. You and your Allies may spend Move, Regular, and Anytime boost the number of Targets this Spell will hit by 1 per Action spent.

name: Powershot EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Attack a creature with a powerful bow shot that deals 6d6 damage.
originalText: Attack a Target with a powerful bow shot that deals 15 Damage.

name: Soothe Beast EX
description: Place your hand on a wild Beast to sooth it's spirit and cause it to become passive and playful. natural 20s with this Ability cause you to permanently Charm the Beast into becoming your Companion. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Place your hand on a wild Beast to sooth it's spirit and cause it to become passive and playful. Critical Hits with this Ability cause you to permanently Charm the Beast into becoming your Companion.

name: Ice Shot EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Attack a with a icy bow shot that deals 6d6 damage and cannot miss.
originalText: Attack a with a icy bow shot that deals 15 Damage and cannot miss.

name: Eagle Sight EX
description: Summon an eagle that up flies high above the battlefield that you can mentally link with to see to its eyes. You are Immune to Blinding while your Eagle has clear vision of the battlefield.
originalText: Summon an eagle that up flies high above the Battlefield that you can mentally link with to see to its eyes. You are Immune to Blinding while your Eagle has clear vision of the Battlefield.

name: Rolling Shot EX
description: Make an attack roll as part of this ability. Barrel roll while attacking moving up to 15 feet and shoot them with a bow shot that deals 4d6 damage during the roll. Average Rolls or higher cause you to not use an Action with this Ability.
originalText: Barrel roll while attacking moving up to 3 Spaces and shoot them with a bow shot that deals 10 Damage during the roll. Average Rolls or higher cause you to not use an Action with this Ability.

name: Volley EX
description: Launch a volley of arrows into the air hitting every hostile creature on the battlefield for 2d6 damage.
originalText: Launch a volley of arrows into the air hitting every Foe on the Battlefield for 5 Damage.

name: Whirling Staff EX
description: Twirl your staff hitting the creature in front and behind you for 6d6 damage. These creatures are hit at the same time. You may shift 10 feet before using this Ability.
originalText: Twirl your staff hitting the Target in front and behind you for 15 Damage. These Targets are hit at the same time. You may shift 2 space before using this Ability.

name: Novaflame EX
description: Release a powerful arcane flame in a ring outwards around you dealing 4d6 damage to hostile creatures. creatures are all hit at the same time.
originalText: Release a powerful arcane flame in a ring outwards around you dealing 10 Damage to Foes. Targets are all hit at the same time.

name: Lotus Blast EX
description: Blast a creature with a rainbow colored ball of arcane energies dealing 8d6 damage and push them in any direction of your choice up to 15 feet. The push occurs slightly after you deal damage. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Blast a Target with a rainbow colored ball of arcane energies dealing 20 Damage and push them in any direction of your choice up to 3 spaces. The push occurs slightly after you deal Damage.

name: Lotus Bloom EX

originalText: Bloom an arcane flower over an Area restoring 25 Stamina to all Allies in the area.

name: Arcane Bolts EX

originalText: Unleash a barrage of 5 bolts that deal 5 Damage each at up to 5 Targets. Targets are hit one after another in any order you choose.

name: Blossom EX
description: Fertilize the growth of some lotus flowers and transform a space on the into Rough Terrain. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Fertilize the growth of some lotus flowers and transform a space on the into Rough Terrain.

name: Voidspell EX

originalText: Crush up an old paper from a book of spells and release it's power dealing 20 Damage to a Target.

name: Invisibility EX

originalText: Vanish out of sight making it nearly impossible for Foes to track you. You remain invisible even when you Basic Attack or cast a Spell, but this Spell is broken if another Party Member is put in Danger or you take Damage.

name: Essence Shank EX

originalText: Quickly thrust at a Target dealing 10 Damage. Average Rolls or higher cause you to cast a random Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action at the Target as well.

name: Drain Magic EX

originalText: Drain the magical essence from a Target dealing 10 Damage and conjuring some wild magic. Average Rolls or higher cause to cast a random Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action at the Target as well.

name: Dissolve Magic EX

originalText: Crush up an old paper from a book of spells and release it's power to restore 40 Stamina to you or an Ally.

originalText: Launch a bolt of water that deals 15 Damage to Foes or restores 30 Stamina to Allies.

originalText: Release a tidal wave across the entire Battlefield that does 5 Damage to all Foes.

originalText: Conjure a fist made of earth that launches forward and deals 15 Damage.

originalText: Summon forth a hand made of earth from beneath a Target that grapples onto their body, Stunning them.

name: Aqua Cannon EX

originalText: Blast a Target with a ball of water that deals 5 Damage to Foes or restores 5 Stamina to Allies. Whenever you cast this Spell, you may cast 2 additional copies of this Spell as No-Roll Bonus Actions.

originalText: Receive a gift from Dragon Aspect Rokesh and completely restore your Stamina.

originalText: Slash a Target with an attack which causes a Death Roll, a signature strike created by Dragon Aspect Golestandt.

name: Chosen Ending EX

originalText: True Sharpswords can always tell when it is their time to die. You are Immune to Death Rolls until end of combat as long as another Party Member is still in fighting. After combat is over, you must Death Roll to die from internal injuries or seppuku.

originalText: Strike a Target with a simply attack using a weapon you have mastered and practised with for many years that deals 20 Damage.

originalText: Sharpen an Allies weapon using a runestone causing it to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks for the rest of combat. High Rolls cause them to deal Triple Damage with Basic Attacks.

originalText: Swing swiftly at a Target with a simple attack that disarms their weapon, Stunning them.

name: Bravado EX

originalText: Spin or bow with a quick combat gesture that restores all of your Stamina.

originalText: All Foes in an Area centered around you are put into a lifeless trance, Stunning them.

originalText: Amplify the life force of up to 2 Targets transforming them into a Large Tiles until end of combat.

name: Conjure Fortune EX

originalText: Transform air into a random piece of Treasure using a large amount of mana. Draw a random Treasure card and add it to your Inventory or give it to another Player. You cannot use this Ability as a Bonus Action or Anytime Action.

originalText: Enchant the boots of your Party granting them greater swiftness. For the rest of combat, all Allies can move up to 10 spaces with Move Actions.

name: Mending Magic EX

originalText: Repair the inner spirit of all Allies in an Area restoring 20 Stamina.

description: Imbue glyphs of power on you and your allies equipment that can be activated in combat to grant each of you a Bonus Action. You cannot cast this Spell in Combat.
originalText: Imbue glyphs of power on you and your Allies equipment that can be activated in combat to grant each of you a Bonus Action. You cannot cast this Spell in Combat.

originalText: Release a burst of holy Light on an Ally that restores 40 Stamina.

originalText: Summons an Ally to this empty space, regardless where they are on the Battlefield.

originalText: Release small missiles shimmer many different colors that deals 20 Damage to Foes in an Area randomly chosen by the Gamemaster.

originalText: Summon forth a wall of stone and ice that transforms 5 connected spaces into Walled Terrain. This wall is made of stone bricks and would be very hard to break through. A skilled Earth mage can unsummon this wall with a whisper.

originalText: Detonate a fiery explosion that deals 10 Damage to all Targets in an Area, knocking all Targets back up to 5 spaces.

name: Mark of Mystery EX

originalText: A mystical Mark of Arcane chaos that can morph into almost any form of Magic. Draw a Random Spell and then cast it as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Madness Potion EX

originalText: Share a drink with Party Members that causes rage and violent natures to flourish. Whenever a Die is be rolled by a Player, they roll 3 Dice instead until a Party Member Critically Fails.

originalText: Consume a sip of this vile potion that will force you to Brutal Death Roll at the end of combat, but will prevent most Death Rolls until then. Allies in adjacent spaces may use this Ability with your permission.

originalText: Launch a potion or concoction at a Target dealing 5 Damage. Draw a random Potion card and use it on the Target as part of this attack.

originalText: Quickly brew a potion in the midst of battle. Draw a random Potion card and add it to your Inventory. You may not use this Ability if you already have a Potion in your Inventory.

originalText: Throw out a dark tendril that pierces a living Target to drain their blood, dealing 10 Damage and restoring all of your Stamina. The Target must be a Living being for this Spell to have any effect.

originalText: Drain your own health and release it in a giant red firework that engulfs the skies above the Battlefield, restoring all of your other Allies Stamina and draining 25 of your own Stamina.

originalText: Shoot forth a blast of energy transfused from your blood that deals 30 Damage to a Target and draining 30 of your own Stamina.

originalText: Inject yourself or your Companion with healing blood magic which restores all of your Stamina.

originalText: Hurl a magical ball of sand that deals 15 Damage to a Target, Blinding them. If successful, select an empty space adjacent to the Target to be transformed into a Rough Terrain space.

originalText: Disappear from the Battlefield leaving behind a clone of sand that falls to the floor.
