description: Hurl a magical ball of mud that deals 6d6 damage to a creature and Silencing them. If successful, select an empty space adjacent to the creature to be transformed into a Rough Terrain space. Affected creatures may make an appropriate saving throw against the companion ability DC to resist or halve the effect.
originalText: Hurl a magical ball of mud that deals 15 Damage to a Target and Silencing them. If successful, select an empty space adjacent to the Target to be transformed into a Rough Terrain space.

originalText: Create a sound using only magic and sand anywhere on the Battlefield. This sound can be anything you can imagine and may distract or surprise Targets who hear it.

originalText: Release a wave of enchanting water onto the Battlefield that turns all Rough Terrain into Walled Terrain. Targets in these spaces are Stunned as they are encased in Cement.

originalText: Dart forward moving up to 3 spaces and strike a Target with an Weapon or Item that deals 15 Damage. If Successful, you may then move an additional 3 spaces.

originalText: Choose an Ally in range to be your Buckle Buddy until end of combat. originalText: Strike a Target with a Weapon or Item that deals 10 Damage and marking them with an X. Allies who attack this Target are sure to hit with their Basic Attacks and Abilities unless they Critically Fail.

originalText: Take a Swig of Ale which restores all of your Stamina. Adjacent Allies may also take a swig of the Ale and use this Ability as a No-Roll Bonus Action whenever you use this Ability. Drinking from this keg more than once per combat causes you to become Charmed.

name: Old Handcannon EX

originalText: Pull out an old Handcannon you carry around and fire it at a Target in range dealing 20 Damage and knocking them back 10 spaces.

originalText: Fire some of the ashes of a fallen friend or relative at a Target dealing 5 Damage and transforming the spaces adjacent to the Target into a Rough Terrain.

originalText: Make it rain gold on the Battlefield, Charming all Targets in an Area. This Ability is also dependant on the Targets morals to be successful.

originalText: Attempt to Bribe a Target to your side, Charming them permanently or until they get a better offer. This Ability is also dependant on the Targets morals to be successful.

originalText: Strike a Target twice for 10 Damage each, first with a sword and then with a pistol.

originalText: Conjure a chunk of gold to melt into ammo to fire a projectile that deals 15 Damage.

originalText: Barrage a Target dealing 10 Damage as you attempt to force them to give up one of their Treasures. High Rolls cause you to draw 1 random Treasure card and add it to your Inventory.

originalText: Drain the golden magic out of a valuables you keep stored away and fully restore your Stamina.

originalText: Draw both of your pistols and fire at 2 different Targets dealing 15 Damage each.

originalText: Take a glance around the room and then in one swift motion attack each Target on the Battlefield for 5 Damage with your pistols. Rolling a Critical Success causes all of these shots to be aimed at the heads of your Targets forcing Death Rolls.

originalText: Spin your pistol around your fingers and shoot wildly at a Target dealing 15 Damage. High Rolls count as Critical Hits.

originalText: Spit a poisonous attack at a Target that deals 10 Damage. High Rolls cause Stunning by having the magic of the attack turn the Target to stone.

originalText: Pull out a bottle of Porco Sangrio, ignite it, and throw it in an Area dealing 10 Damage and transforming all empty spaces into Dangerous Terrain.

originalText: Whistle for 3 cartel minions of your race linked to you and place them anywhere on the Battlefield. These minions appear out of portals from the Realm of Holding.

originalText: Pull out some bottles of Porco Sangrio from the Realm of Holding and pass them out to you and your Allies that restores 40 Stamina.

originalText: You and a Target take a nap, Stunning both of you. At the start of next round, fully restore you and your Targets Stamina.

originalText: Conjure a gust of razor sharp petals that deal 15 Damage in a Line. This Line can change direction once midflight.

Whenever you dodge an attack with this Ability, you may cast a Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action.
originalText: Prepare yourself from incoming attacks and spells. For the rest of the round, you may roll to Dodge Basic Attacks and Abilities with High Rolls. Whenever you dodge an attack with this Ability, you may cast a Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

originalText: Release a barrage of leaves in all directions at all Foes in range that deal 5 Damage in a Line. Each Line can change direction once midflight.

originalText: Release a Targets inner strength by causing them to grow in size, transforming them into a Large Tile.

description: Summon a flurry of black petals that cause creatures hit to Death Roll in a Line. This Line can change direction once midflight.
originalText: Summon a flurry of black petals that cause Targets hit to Death Roll in a Line. This Line can change direction once midflight.

originalText: Discharge spores into the air of the Battlefield that take advantage of the mistakes of Foes. For the rest of the round, Low Rolls by Foes cause them to take 25 Damage.

originalText: Release the umami from the meats in your cooking causing you to cast magic wildly. Draw 1 random Fire or 1 random Ice Spell and cast them as No-Roll Bonus Actions.

originalText: Spew salty fish yogurt in an Area around you fully restoring the Stamina of Allies. High Rolls increase the Area of this Spell to 5.

originalText: Spew spicy ale in an Area around you dealing 15 Damage to Foes. High Rolls increase the Area of this Spell to 5.

name: Sea Bones EX

originalText: Pull out your bag of Sea Bones, inspiring your Allies to greatness. You and your Allies roll with 3 Dice for the rest of the round. Rolling doubles grants the Player a Bonus Action. Rolling triples extends this Spell to last for the rest of the game.

description: Whip some hot soup from a metal pot at a creature dealing 6d6 damage causing Burning. roll of 15 or highers increase the Range of this Spell to 10
originalText: Whip some hot soup from a metal pot at a Target dealing 15 Damage causing Burning. High Rolls increase the Range of this Spell to 10

name: Flambe EX
description: Serve up a fiery dish to an ally that causes the next Spell they cast to be much more powerful. The next Spell your ally casts this round casts a second copy of itself as a No-Roll Bonus Action.
originalText: Serve up a fiery dish to an Ally that causes the next Spell they cast to be much more powerful. The next Spell your Ally casts this round casts a second copy of itself as a No-Roll Bonus Action.

name: Torpedo EX
description: Throw a spear made of icy water that deals 8d6 damage to a creature. roll of 15 or highers cut the creatures current hit points in half.
originalText: Throw a spear made of icy water that deals 20 Damage to a Target. High Rolls cut the Targets current Stamina in half.

description: Engulf the entire battlefield in a snowstorm dealing 2d6 damage to all hostile creatures at the end of the round. roll of 15 or highers cut the hostile creatures current hit points in half at the end of the round.
originalText: Engulf the entire Battlefield in a snowstorm dealing 5 Damage to all Foes at the end of the round. High Rolls cut the Foes current Stamina in half at the end of the round.

description: Throw an enchanted frozen disc at up to 3 creatures dealing 6d6 damage. roll of 15 or highers cause you to throw 2 frozen discs.
originalText: Throw an enchanted frozen disc at up to 3 Targets dealing 15 Damage. High Rolls cause you to throw 2 frozen discs.

name: Bladeturn EX

originalText: Summon a barrier made of a ice that protects you from an incoming attack. The next source of Damage you take this round is negated.

name: Fog of Maddening EX

originalText: Engulf the Battlefield in a black fog that Poisons all Targets and causes them to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks for the rest of the round.

originalText: Open a bag of holding that pours out a school of arcane carp who can be bent to your will. Summon up to 3 Magical Carp Minions that are Linked to you.

originalText: A long coat with many spots to hold scrolls and tomes hidden inside.

name: Porc Skin Armor
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Armor made from the skin of dead Porcs that is often very threatening to look at.
originalText: Armor made from the skin of dead Porcs that is often very threatening to look at.

name: Studded Armor
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Leathery armor with bronze studs makes this armor very durable and attractive to wear.
originalText: Leathery armor with bronze studs makes this armor very durable and attractive to wear.

name: Elven Vestments
description: Utility item. Converted effect: Traditional clothing worn by Elves from the times before the Birth of Magic.
originalText: Traditional clothing worn by Elves from the times before the Birth of Magic.

name: Spellplate
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Enchanted lightweight plate armor that has been custom made for a true battle mage.
originalText: Enchanted lightweight plate armor that has been custom made for a true battle mage.

name: Plate Chain
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Very basic chain armor woven together by Dwarven blacksmiths. This armor provides the best weight and agility without sacrificing defense of almost all traditional armor.
originalText: Very basic chain armor woven together by Dwarven blacksmiths. This armor provides the best weight and agility without sacrificing defense of almost all traditional armor.

name: Clockodile Hide
description: Utility item. Converted effect: Clothing crafted from the hides of the dangerous clockodile beasts. The hide is heavy and thick, but naturally resistant to both Fire and Ice magics.
originalText: Clothing crafted from the hides of the dangerous clockodile beasts. The hide is heavy and thick, but naturally resistant to both Fire and Ice magics.

name: Arcanist Tails
description: Utility item. Converted effect: A fancy Mage suit often worn by Nobleborn Elves or those attended a high society gathering.
originalText: A fancy Mage suit often worn by Nobleborn Elves or those attended a high society gathering.

name: Elegant Garments
description: Utility item. Converted effect: Clothing made to elevate your status among your peers. Provides little protection in battle, but your presence among others is much more grand.
originalText: Clothing made to elevate your status among your peers. Provides little protection in battle, but your presence among others is much more grand.

name: Plate Armor
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Made from the strongest of metals, this armor makes you look and feel invincible.
originalText: Made from the strongest of metals, this armor makes you look and feel invincible.

name: Bold Scalemail
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Crafted from the crystallized limbs of dead Kobolds, this armor shines as if you were covered in gemstones.
originalText: Crafted from the crystallized limbs of dead Kobolds, this armor shines as if you were covered in gemstones.

name: Regal Garb
description: Utility item. Converted effect: A symbol of high status that shows you are very much an important person.
originalText: A symbol of high status that shows you are very much an important person.

name: Elaphelk Bonemail
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Strapped and sawed together, this armor is made from the bones of dead Elaphelks and greatly restricts your mobility in combat while making it almost impossible to attack you from any angle.
originalText: Strapped and sawed together, this armor is made from the bones of dead Elaphelks and greatly restricts your mobility in combat while making it almost impossible to attack you from any angle.

name: Gemstone Regalia
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Forged by the Dvergr Dvergr, this armor is not only colorful, but is also highly resistant to all forms of magic.
originalText: Forged by the Dvergr Dvergr, this armor is not only colorful, but is also highly resistant to all forms of magic.

name: Gilded Armour
description: This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. There are some who would say it's not wise to craft armor from Gold. You are not one of those people.
originalText: There are some who would say it's not wise to craft armor from Gold. You are not one of those people.

name: Small Buckler

originalText: A small wooden shield. As with all Shields, whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Block with a High Roll.

name: Regrowth Shield

originalText: A living shield made of vines. As with all Shields, whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Block with a High Roll.

name: Light Kite Shield

originalText: A studded light weight shield. As with all Shields, whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Block with a High Roll.

name: Heater Shield

originalText: An iron based heater shield. As with all Shields, whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Block with a High Roll.

name: Tower Shield

originalText: A massive shield the same size as your character. As with all Shields, whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Block with a High Roll.

name: Dexterous

originalText: You are very nimble in combat and can easily dodge attacks. Whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Dodge with a High Roll.

originalText: You and another Party Member trained together at a young age. Whenever you are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Dodge with a High Roll. When you purchase this Ability in Character Creation, add it to another Party Members Inventory as well.

originalText: You have the power to bend and slow time for you and your Party. Whenever you or other Party Members are attacked by a Basic Attack or Ability, you may Roll to Dodge with a High Roll.

name: Spider Slayer
description:
This weapon uses a standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. On hit, it deals 1d6 damage of an appropriate type. Converted effect: A long blade named by the Grand Paladin Order for it's practical use in fighting the Spiders and their Ageless Thrall hordes. You are Immune to Poison and Burning.

This card was part of the "The Grand Paladin Order" campaign
and is not included in the base decks.

A long blade named by the Grand Paladin Order for it's practical use in fighting the Spiders and their Ageless Thrall hordes. You are Immune to Poison and Burning.

name: Webweaver Armor
description:
This is a D&D-compatible armour reward. Specially designed spellplate crafted by the greatest elven and dwarven minds of this area for fighting against the ageless threats of this realm. If your Stamina is less than 100, set it to 100 even after Character Creation. You are Immune to Danger Terrain on spaces you choose to enter.

This card was part of the "The Grand Paladin Order" campaign
and is not included in the base decks.

This card was part of the "The Grand Paladin Order" campaign

name: Worthless Dwarven Trinket
description:
Utility item. Converted effect: A small dwarven trinket that is played with often by children. Once per game, you may study this trinket and roll for your Legendary Item from this campaign. If you roll a 1 however, this becomes your Legendary Item.

and is not included in the base decks.

name: Dragon Sand

When consumed your next Action occurs three times as you go into a drug like craze for a few brief moments. Your first Critical Failure will result in a Death Roll unless you have consumed Dragon Sand recently.

name: Enchanted Golden Sword
description: This weapon uses a standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. On hit, it deals 1d6 damage of an appropriate type. originalText: A golden sword enchanted with a spell that makes it laugh at everyone else's jokes, just not yours. The laugh is very creepy and haunting and often leaves those who hear it feeling a little bit awkward.

originalText: A small jar of juice made from a fruit called apples. This apple juice is sentient and will come to life when you least expect it and attempt to kill you.

originalText: A rally to attend an underground rally for Goblin rights in the realm. There is an interesting picture of an elven woman known as the veiled queen who seems to be very important to the organization. Goblins around the realm will respect anyone who carries one of these around.

originalText: An old large carriage wheel. The paint decals have faded and chipped and it weighs a lot to carry. Reduce the number of spaces you can move by 1 while wearing this item.

originalText: A tin can filled with blood from an unknown source. Death Roll if consumed.

originalText: Swing your Warhammer or weapon of choice in a forward arc dealing 15 Damage to up to 3 Targets. Skilled Dark Mages take 30 Damage instead.

originalText: Radiate forward a wave of bright fire that deals 15 Damage to Targets hit. Skilled Dark Mages take 30 Damage instead.

originalText: Sear a Targets mind with the Light showing them the evil of their ways. If successful, they become Charmed until you Die and they cannot cast Dark Magic while under your command.

originalText: Release a wave of light onto a Target that fully restores their Stamina. Skilled Dark Mages burn from this holy light and take Damage equal to twice your maximum Stamina instead.

originalText: Give yourself up in the good name of the holy light, blessing all of your Allies for your sacrifice. No Ally, other than yourself, can be put in Danger or Killed for the rest of the round.

originalText: Bless each Player with a powerful blessing that strengthens them to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat. Critical Failures still bless other Players regardless of the punishment from the failure.

originalText: Turn your Fist or Weapon into a shard of ice and stab a Target for 20 Damage. High Rolls cause Freezing.

originalText: Summon a powerful ball of light in your hands that can be thrown for 99 Damage to a single Target or split into three separate balls that each deal 50 Damage to up to 3 Targets. Targets hit by Flare are Blinded.

originalText: Teleport to Target empty space instantly. You may grab onto and bring 1 Adjacent Target with you.

originalText: Create a dense fog in 8 connected empty spaces and transform them into Rough Terrain. Skilled Earth Mages are not affected by these spaces. If ignited by a Fire Spell, all connected fog spaces will explode dealing 25 Damage to any Target inside or adjacent to these spaces.

originalText: Throw a fire spear that deals 20 Damage and causes Burning. Critical Hits grant you 2 Bonus Actions.

originalText: Throw a massive ball of fire that deals 99 damage in an Area and causes Burning. Critical Hits incinerate most Targets forcing them to Death Roll 3 times. This Spell Critically Fails when not casted by Skilled Fire Mage.

originalText: Blast a Target with a burst of frost that deals 20 Damage and Freezing them. Critical Hits allow you to cast this Spell twice again as a No-Roll Bonus Actions.

originalText: Counter a Spell a Target is casting causing them to Critically Fail. Critical Hits when casting this Spell will force the Target to Death Roll 5 times. Casting this Spell without something to counter results in you interrupting yourself and Critical Failing.

originalText: Shoot a barrage of 5 missiles that each deal 5 Damage at up to 5 Targets. Critical Hits double both the number of missiles fired and damage dealt.

originalText: Focus your willpower and cast any of your Spells instantly as a No-Roll Bonus Action. High Rolls cause you to guarantee that whatever Spell you cast is also a Critical Hit.

originalText: Release a powerful yodel that deals 20 damage and Silencing them. The sound waves of the Yodel are so powerful, it is possible to bank them off walls.

originalText: Pound the earth with your fist or weapon and cause spikes to erupt out of every Rough Terrain space on the board dealing 25 Damage to Targets in these spaces and then turning them into Dangerous Terrain.

originalText: Summon 8 smaller versions of your Companion as Minions linked to you. Your Companion may take hits on behalf of these Minions when they are attacked to keep them alive.

originalText: Place your hand on a dead Beast and bond your spirits as one, disintegrating the body into raw magic power and absorbing it as a tattoo onto your flesh. You are Immune to Damage for the rest of the round.

originalText: Strike a Target with a pinched fist causing a Basic Attack and Poisoning them. If the Target is already Poisoned, you may Basic Attack them twice instead.

name: Force Pillar

originalText: Attempts to soothe the inner spirit of a Target, reducing hatred, aggression, fear or an emotion of your choice. Some Foes can be removed from combat or even made to join your Party as a Companion from the effects of this Spell.

originalText: Conjure forth a hand of shadow that swipes an Area dealing 15 damage. You may also use the Claw to grab a hold of a single Target instead of an Area, which causes the Target to take an additional 5 Damage and Burning them.

originalText: The art of quick and precise sewing using dark tendrils that extend out from your back. Craft a pair of Cloth Robes and give them to a Character. This Ability can be used multiple times at Character Creation to give you and other Party Members.

originalText: Enchant a Target's mind causing them to believe they are being praised by the divine themselves and forced to bend to their will, Charming them. You may suggest what the Target should do with their Actions.

originalText: Cast a distraction and in the blink of an eye make a Target disappear which Stuns by causing them to vanish from the Battlefield. The Target reappears once they they are no longer Stunned.

name: Flock of Ravens

If all ravens are killed, you are put in Danger.
originalText: Transform yourself into a flock of up to 5 ravens and place them in empty adjacent spaces. Each raven can only take a single attack before they are killed. name: Copycat

originalText: Perform an non-Item Ability used by an Ally this round. Limited Abilities can still only be used once per Character.

name: Polymorph

originalText: Transform a Target into a random Beast Companion until end of combat. Targets may roll at the start of combat to attempt to break this transformation with a High Roll as if it were a status effect.

name: Card Trick

originalText: Pull out a Deck of Cards that empower the Spells of your team. For the rest of the round, whenever you or an Ally cast a Spell, they may draw a random Spell and then choose to cast that Spell instead.

name: Swipe Clothing

originalText: Grab a Target and swap places with them and in a blur swap clothing with them. If used on a Party Member, you swap Armors. If used on a Foe wearing clothing, you may draw 1 random Armor card to replace your Armor with. Your Maximum Stamina does not change when changing Armors.

name: Featherfye

originalText: Bewitch a Target reducing their weight to that of a feather. The Target will be able to float around the Battlefield and is Immune to Rough and Dangerous Terrain, but is very vulnerable to knockback abilities.

name: Seek Destiny

originalText: Peer through the void to attempt and catch a glimpse of your destiny, but often finding nothing but a mix of confusing images. Naturally Rolled Critical Hits while in combat, cause you to draw a Legendary Spell Scroll and add it to your Character.

name: Dream Staff

originalText: Pull a fancy wooden staff from a small portal that leads to inside the Dream World. Add this card to you or another Party Members Inventory and place it in a Weapon slot. As a Weapon, this staff doubles the range of Spells.

originalText: Place your hand against a Target and force them to sleep, Stunning them. Casting this Spell as a No-Roll Bonus Actions causes it to backfire and Stun you.

name: Dreamwalk

originalText: Walk through the dream world and teleport to Target empty space attacking an adjacent Target with a Basic Attack. You and your Allies may spend Move and Regular actions to boost the number of Basic Attacks on the adjacent Target after teleporting.

name: Dreambolt

originalText: Blast a target with a shadowy blue mist that deals 20 Damage. You and your Allies may spend Move and Regular Actions to boost the Damage of this Spell by 10 per Action spent.

name: Hallucination

originalText: Create 2 Hallucinations of any Target on the Battlefield as Minions linked to you and place them in empty adjacent spaces. You and your Allies may spend Move and Regular actions to boost the number of Hallucinations summoned by 2 per Action spent.

originalText: Force a Nightmare onto a Target, Charming them. You and your Allies may spend Move and Regular boost the number of Targets this Spell will hit by 1 per Action spent.

originalText: Terrorize a Target dealing 50 Damage and Silencing them. You and your Allies may spend Move and Regular actions to boost the damage of this Spell by 50 per Action spent.

name: The Dreamworld

originalText: Release a rainbow mist that brings all Characters on the Battlefield into the Dreamworld. While in the Dreamworld, Characters still take Damage, but cannot be killed. originalText: Grab a Target by their head and erase their mind blank, Stunning them. High Rolls cause the Target to Death Roll, killing them by leaving the Target in a vegetable state.

originalText: Empower one of your Spells you are currently casting, boosting it as if you spent 3 additional Actions. If you are in the Dreamworld, add an additional 3 Actions. originalText: Attack a Target with a Basic Attack that cannot miss. If your arrows are Augmented with Fire, this Ability causes Burning. If your Arrows are Augmented with Ice, the Target takes 10 extra damage.

originalText: Attack a Target with a Basic Attack that cannot miss. If your arrows are Augmented with Ice, this Ability causes Freezing. If your Arrows are Augmented with Fire, the Target takes 10 extra damage.

originalText: Empower your weapon with a Fire or Ice augment which causes you to deal Double Damage with Basic Attacks until end of combat. High Rolls with a Fire augment cause Burning and High Rolls with an Ice augment cause Freezing.

originalText: Summon an eagle that up flies high above the Battlefield that you can mentally link with to see through its eyes. You are Immune to Blinding while your Eagle has clear vision of the Battlefield.

originalText: Place your hand on a wild Beast to sooth it's spirit and cause it to become passive and playful. Critical Hits with this Ability cause you to permanently Charm the Beast into becoming your Companion.

name: Lotus Blast

originalText: Blast a Target with a rainbow colored ball of arcane energies dealing 25 Damage and push them in any direction of your choice up to 3 spaces. The push occurs slightly after you deal Damage.

originalText: Bloom an Arcane flower over an Area restoring 30 Stamina to all Allies in the Area.

originalText: Unleash a barrage of 5 bolts that deal 5 Damage each at up to 5 Targets. Targets are hit one after another in any order you choose.

originalText: Release a powerful arcane flame in a ring outwards around you dealing 20 Damage to Foes. Targets are all hit at the same time.

originalText: Cover you and a Target in a shield made of an Arcane flower which restores 30 Stamina and prevents all Damage from the next Basic Attack or Ability this round.

originalText: Freeze time for all Players, non-Divine, and non-Believers for a few moments. All Players gain a Bonus Action which they all can prepare to use all at once when time unfreezes. originalText: Restore 30 Stamina to all Allies on the Battlefield and restore one of their Anytime Actions. Targets are all hit one after another chosen by you.

originalText: Fertilize the growth of some lotus flowers and transform any space on the Battlefield into Rough Terrain. High Rolls allow you to choose up to 5 spaces to transform into Rough Terrain.

originalText: Quickly thrust at a Target with a melee Basic Attack dealing double Damage. High Rolls cause you to drain enough magic to draw 1 random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory.

originalText: Drain the magical essence from a Target dealing 15 Damage and conjuring a scroll of made of golden magic. Draw 1 random Spell Scroll and add it to your Inventory.

originalText: Destroy a Spell Scroll in your Inventory to deal 25 Damage to a Target. On Critical Hits, you may cast the Spell destroyed by this Ability as well.

originalText: Interrupt a Target casting a Spell and absorb the magic power they are conjuring, drawing a random Spell Scroll and adding it to your Inventory. Casting this Spell without something to interrupt results in you absorbing some of your own magic and Critical Failing.

originalText: Vanish out of sight making it nearly impossible for Foes to track you. You remain invisible even when you Basic Attack or cast a Spell, but this Spell is broken if another Party Member is put in Danger or you take Damage.

originalText: Copy a Spell Scroll to create extra copies of that Spell. Choose a Spell Scroll in you or a Party Members Inventory and create 2 copies of it to add to your Inventory. Trying to copy a Legendary Spell Scroll is virtually impossible.

originalText: Launch a bolt of water that deals 10 Damage to Foes or restores 10 Stamina to Allies.

originalText: Cast an enchanting splashing ripple that is pleasant to watch, but does nothing. When you cast this Spell, you may cast 2 additional copies of this Spell as No-Roll Bonus Actions.

originalText: Summon an elemental shoulder cannon on your arm that prevents you from moving for the rest of the round. Whenever you would restore Stamina to an Ally, instead deal that much Damage to any Target in range.

originalText: Release a tidal wave across the entire Battlefield that does 20 Damage to all Foes. When you cast this Spell, you may cast 2 additional copies of this Spell as No-Roll Bonus Actions.

originalText: Conjure a fist made of earth that launches forward and deals 10 Damage. When you purchase this Ability, you may give it to a Player as well for free.

originalText: Roar out in an Area centered around you causing all Foes to No-Roll Basic Attack you for 1 Damage. When you purchase this Ability, you may give it to a Player as well for free.

originalText: Summon forth a hand made of earth from beneath a Target that grapples onto their body, Stunning them. When you purchase this Ability, you may give it to a Player as well for free.

originalText: Receive a gift from Dragon Aspect Rokesh and completely restore your Stamina. When you purchase this Ability, you may give it to other Players as well for free.

originalText: Permanently destroy an enchanted object to deal 75 Damage to all adjacent Foes around the enchanted object. Remove an Enchanted Object card from your Inventory when using this Ability. originalText: Amplify the life force of up to 3 Targets transforming them into a Large Tiles until end of combat.

originalText: Imbue glyphs of power on you and your Allies equipment that can be activated in combat to grant each of you a Bonus Action. You cannot cast this Spell in Combat.

originalText: Take a small amount of Dragon Gold and imbue it into a common object. If you already have an Enchanted Object card in your Inventory, add another copy of it to your Inventory. originalText: All Foes on the Battlefield are put into a lifeless trance, Stunning them.

originalText: Transform air into a random piece of Treasure using a large amount of mana. Draw a random Treasure card and add it to your Inventory or give it to another Player. You may use this ability once at Character Creation.

originalText: A dangerous enchantment that enchants an object with a curse that causes any who hold it to be highly intoxicated. Casting this on the flesh of a living being can be life altering, so extreme caution is advised when casting.

originalText: Detonate a fiery explosion that deals 10 Damage to all Targets in an Area, knocking all Targets back up to 5 spaces.

originalText: Fire off a barrage of small missiles that shimmer many different colors and deals a total of 20 Damage to Foes randomly chosen by the Gamemaster in an Area.

originalText: A dazzling enchantment that Doubles the Damage of the Basic Attacks of the Character with this Runemaster Mark or on a space with it. originalText: Summons an Ally to this empty space, regardless where they are on the Battlefield. If this Spell is not cast as a Runemaster Mark by a skilled Earth Mage, the Ally you summon will crash into you, Stunning you both.

originalText: Release a burst of holy Light on an Ally that restores 60 Stamina.

originalText: Summon forth a wall made up of stone and solid black ice that transforms 5 connected spaces into Walled Terrain. This wall is made of stone bricks and would be very hard to break through. A skilled Earth mage can unsummon this wall with a whisper.

originalText: Freezes time in a greenish bubble, Stunning all Targets in an Area.

originalText: A mystical Mark of Arcane chaos that can morph into almost any form of Magic. When casted or triggered, draw a random Spell and then select a Target.

originalText: Instantly create a duplicate of every Runemaster Mark on the Battlefield. You may put the duplicates of each Mark anywhere on the Battlefield. originalText: Purge all magic from the Battlefield, removing all Magical effects, transformed spaces, transformations from all Targets.

originalText: Provoke the old gods in a way that could benefit you greatly or ruin you entirely. You may force a reroll for a Player, Ally, or Foe, but instead of rolling 1 Die, they roll 6. You may not use this ability on a Critical Success or Critical Failure roll.

originalText: Shoot forth a blast of energy transfused from your blood that deals 40 Damage to a Target and draining 40 of your own Stamina.

originalText: Release a wave of red blood magic that deals 25 damage to Foes in an Area around you and draining 50 of your own Stamina.

originalText: Throw out a dark tendril that pierces a living Target to drain their blood, dealing 15 Damage and restoring all of your Stamina. The Target must be living for this Spell to have any effect.

originalText: Drain your own health and release it in a giant red firework that engulfs the skies above the Battlefield, restoring all of your other Allies Stamina and draining 30 of your own Stamina.

originalText: Bend the blood inside of a Target dealing 25 Damage causing them to be both Blinded and Silenced, draining 25 of your own Stamina to cast this Spell. The Target must be living for this Spell to have any effect.

originalText: Inject yourself or your Companion with healing blood magic, restoring all of your Stamina.

name: Blood Frenzy

originalText: Drain all of the blood from your Companion into a giant red ball and absorb it into your Body, killing your Companion, but granting you 5 Bonus Actions. When using these Actions, your Spells that Drain Stamina, restore Stamina instead.

name: Corpse Explosion

originalText: Let out a bellowing shriek in an Area centered around you that forces all Foes who hear it to strike themselves with a Basic Attack.

name: Painful Pleasure

originalText: You release a scent that causes all Allies on the Battlefield to become attracted to pain. At the end of the round, all Allies who took Damage this round have their Stamina full restored.

name: Infatuation
description: Utility item. Converted effect: Memorize all Targets facing in your direction with an enchanting love spell, Charming them. If you do not currently have a Concubine, but have the Concubine Passive, you may transform one of the Targets of this Spell into your new Concubine.
originalText: Memorize all Targets facing in your direction with an enchanting love spell, Charming them. If you do not currently have a Concubine, but have the Concubine Passive, you may transform one of the Targets of this Spell into your new Concubine.

name: Masochism
description: This weapon uses a standard D&D weapon profile chosen by the DM. On hit, it deals 1d6 damage of an appropriate type. Converted effect: Empower your hands with black fire before you relentlessly Basic Attack an Ally over and over as many times as you like. Each Basic Attack deals exactly 30 Damage and you must finishing whipping the Target before any Bonus Actions or effects may come into play.
originalText: Empower your hands with black fire before you relentlessly Basic Attack an Ally over and over as many times as you like. Each Basic Attack deals exactly 30 Damage and you must finishing whipping the Target before any Bonus Actions or effects may come into play.

name: Rotting Frost

originalText: Slash at a Target with a Basic Attack covered with a venomous plague that flows off your weapon, Poisoning them.

name: Bitterblaze

originalText: Drain the heat from a Living being dealing 15 Damage and restoring 30 Stamina to you or an Ally. If the Target attempts to dodge or block this attack, this Spell becomes a Critical Hit. Your Target must be a Living being in order to restore Stamina.

name: Deathstrike

originalText: Strike at a Target with a deathly chill and Basic Attack them. If the Target attempts to dodge or block this attack, this Basic Attack becomes a Critical Hit.

name: Command the Dead

originalText: Force all Ageless beings and Ageless thralls on the Battlefield to bend to your will, Charming them for a moment to grant all of them a No-Roll Basic Attack.

originalText: Envelope a Party Member in shadowy magic that restores one of their Anytime Actions. If your Target is a Living being, deal 20 Damage to them instead.

name: Magic Shell

originalText: Create a barrier of deathfrost that absorbs any magic, negating the Damage and effects completely then granting you a Bonus Action.

originalText: Grab a target with a icy magical grip around their neck dealing 10 Damage and Stunning them.

originalText: Transform into into a wraith which is a spectral ghost form that is immune to most forms of physical and magical attacks for the rest of the round. Adjacent allies may also be pulled into your wraith form becoming a singular being until you all split at the end of the round.

If you do not use this empowerment by the end of the round, this Spell shall freeze the blood in your body forcing you to Death Roll if you are a Living being.

name: Resurrection

originalText: Attempt to bring a Target who has recently been Killed back to life as an Ageless being. As long as their skull is intact, nearly any Target can be brought back to life, however this Spell will fail on anything lower than a High Roll.

originalText: Declare a Law that the Gamemaster must abide for the rest of the round that prevents all Foes from moving. If the Gamemaster breaks this law on purpose or by mistake, you gain a Bonus Action. Only 1 Law may be in active
